user_reviews: [{"Name":"Lorenzo Berardinelli","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLQYZfs7aGmPhWV6GArevvBQrV3lL4dmCAQU_1872nRZD-NgA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I visited the Museum of Illusions in Madrid with my girlfriend, and it was a fun experience overall. However, I think it’s more enjoyable if you go in a group of more than two people, since many of the photo spots are designed for pairs or groups. Inside, there aren’t that many interactive activities, but the main issue is definitely the number of children running around — though of course, you can’t really ask them not to come! Other than that, we had a good time. I’d recommend going with friends or people you know you can have fun with anywhere.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDmml8-lSdI7MJDcz6dCc1F\u0026fid=0x0:0x4b2bd5a4ff4a7207"],"When":"2025-10-27"},{"Name":"Darren Beck","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLRfTQ5lzSivZGEcb4EWCur2uNoffJUe10rBNwzOdNobY-mUg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A little small but worth an hour or so if you want a break from the heat. Note that it definitely skews more toward a younger crowd, and there were a lot of families with little kids there. As a group of two adults though, it was still a fun experience. I’m sure the kids had a great time as well. Staff were great also. Give it a try if you need a break from the sightseeing and just want some fun relaxation and air conditioning!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCDZBKUvmAhb_LOAn8QK7LQ\u0026fid=0x0:0x4b2bd5a4ff4a7207"],"When":"2025-6-13"},{"Name":"rated by maryam • food critic","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV2rFU889_uyIosz_7bpffSFpmpz0-gKcaVKqZvHb7h1qD_qhXV=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely entertaining from start to finish! The Museum of Illusions in Madrid kept us all fully engaged — we could’ve easily spent two hours exploring. The installations are clever, interactive, and truly high quality. My kids had a blast, and honestly, so did I. Every room is picture perfect, and the staff made sure the flow was easy and fun. Whether you’re going with kids or just want to play with perspective and be wowed, this spot delivers.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCvIn2cbOwD1xlT2Bju8D5l\u0026fid=0x0:0x4b2bd5a4ff4a7207"],"When":"2025-7-1"},{"Name":"Alex S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWuqMxZHWW4Q3oWg1MozJ5EDSP48AY-vf9ImsmDzcUsLKEKjbGa=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow! What a great museum! If you want to find where the magic is at in Madrid, look no further! Offering many illusions for you to try out and capture, this museum is incredibly fun for everyone of all ages except people who otherwise have vertigo, as some of the illusions you will have to walk through may not be good for people with vertigo.\nIf you are wanting a fun activity to do with your kids, it’s a great place! Depending on your pace, you could be at this museum for a while. My favourite illusion was the vortex, as it is a really cool experience and it really makes you feel like you are spinning in an actual vortex. If that’s your thing, it is the last illusion downstairs at the very end of the room. He was incredibly kind and patient, explaining how the illusions worked in a way my kids could understand, and even helped us take some amazing photos. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Serxio M.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWFe1zzx43R5EdGut42sR2BPWZAgDqNHxajsyx8mFAZBq2xbIc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Está duplicada la ubicación, pero Google pasa de mí. Tampoco es que te vayas a perder si sigues estás coordenadas, pero la fuente diseñada por Eugenio Sempere está un poco más arriba. Así que te tocará andar la friolera de diez metros, cuesta arriba.

De hecho, las reseñas de la otra ubicación están más curradas y tienen fotos muy chulas.

Yo solo te dejaré una pequeña biografía de Eusebio Sempere que nació en 1928 en Alicante y que falleció en 1966. Fue escultor, pintor y diseñador geometrista. Fue la figura española que mejor representó el arte cinético (no confundir con el cinegético, jajajaja).

Es el autor de muchas de las obras incluidas en el museo al aire libre, incluyendo la gran cascada bajo el paso elevado Enrique de la Mata Gorostizaga.

Por último, añadir que está abierto las 24 horas. Es gratuito y que, a nivel logístico, cómo ya sabrás, está ubicada esta fuente dentro del museo al aire libre, cerca de la Castellana. El metro más próximo es Rubén Darío línea 5","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICd4aq6OA&fid=0x0:0xa9f7270abfaa4462"],"When":"2024-2-15"}]

Precio 6 euros y durante el día de puede ver el museo con guía","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDS1qv2Lw&fid=0x0:0x7f20ef6fea8cccb0"],"When":"2020-12-24"},{"Name":"Johan Hoekstra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWLWFx4RUECuwsy8YFlvL7GWHhentGJMNkiV9stFUbdAl-uIATaFA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Een van de best bewaarde schatten van Madrid: het huis, het atelier én de tuin van Joaquin Sorolla, de schilder van het licht. Vooral het atelier met wanden vol met zijn werk maakt een overdonderende indruk. Aan de inrichting is na zijn dood in 1923  betrekkelijk weinig veranderd. Ook het oude woonhuis met de authentieke meubels is de moeite waard. De intieme tuin kent mooie hoekjes en is met oog  voor details ingericht. Aardig is dat het museum de siësta overslaat en de hele dag geopend is. Sorolla was een verzamelaar van kunst en keramiek, die je ook op verschillende plekken tegenkomt. Aanrader!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICkzYyi5QE&fid=0x0:0x7f20ef6fea8cccb0"],"When":"2019-4-12"},{"Name":"Yalile Martínez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUb1iFGuLwPqgCbqvCYjZv1vjHotHaTrtzaoWmlZDoNEHPvLqQ7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El Museo Sorolla de Madrid es un viaje en el tiempo y en la vida de Joaquín Sorolla. Es un capítulo íntimo, disfrutar de los rincones y jardines de la casa familiar, junto con obras inéditas es todo un privilegio. La conservación de la casa, sus jardines y la decoración es muy buena, es un museo cálido. Una joya en Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICFo_Hvbg&fid=0x0:0x7f20ef6fea8cccb0"],"When":"2023-11-1"},{"Name":"Oriana Tridenti Parada","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVsOuGy-2GDYxZYX1-C2H6Jo81aJprB2knqLPRn_x_Z_ip5gJA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Sin duda alguna parada obligada en Madrid. Les recomiendo la visita guiada cuentan anectotas interésantes. La casa es preciosa y sus cuadros de colección privada dejan sin  palabra a cualquiera. Horarios flexibles y cómodos fácil acceso y muy bien cuidada la casa.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICkvdGA-gE&fid=0x0:0x7f20ef6fea8cccb0"],"When":"2018-8-10"},{"Name":"Dr. Jose A. Barreiro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWj1VEVdXA6inHVINrD1nw-US5ULrvzoZZgsBTYWe0EnuzoBglv=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Este pequeño museo en la que fue la vivienda del pintor es una joya no tan conocida como otros en la ciudad. La colección de hermosas pinturas, taller, muebles y enseres, puede disfrutarse plenamente con la ayuda y conocimientos de nuestra guía Doña Carmen. Sugiero tomar este tour guiado que dura una hora. Esta es una visita altamente recomendable cuando visite Madrid y como complemento conocer la colección en el Museo de Bellas Artes de la hermosa ciudad de Valencia.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"RossBeef","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUCUv5EbPNObLrpX0fmF7Zu1nK4YjovIpHaEDEe87Hc7M3yxLGI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Se te va la olla con Sorolla. Bonito recinto, la casa es una especie de palacete en donde yo viviría encantado. Estaría todo el día apreciando la belleza de los cuadros que ha pintado este fenómeno. También me tomaría mis cafés en el jardín tan espectacular que tiene.
Es más, yo creo que, aunque no tengo ni .... Idea de pintar podría encontrar inspiración en este sitio. De verdad, pinto mal, aquí igual bien!! Quien sabe..
Con respecto a la entrada es barata y más si eres estudiante. Si no lo fuera no pagaría más de 10€","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ana Eslava","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX_FY36n_gKoW-gCt71iCbsMaDsQkRC7Hzkc4WLuWq8MmidhLgmOw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cada Museo que he visitado, me deja algo de admiración. Grande Sorrolla!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marta B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLCL8YBMK4sjEQMkNMpA2SNvY1nZMnz5Pr9Ltb67pYCloZx9g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Es la casa del pintor convertida en museo. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Mykhaylo Kolesnyk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWFxr6VV0hEaMOvzoeA3tlgpu5DwtnE94GKi_X3fayQ9qLcE1-w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Here’s the English translation:

⸻

I’m not sure whether all jamón museums are the same, but I wouldn’t recommend visiting this one. It’s possible there are better dishes, but out of the 7 dishes we tried, there was hardly anything truly enjoyable. I tend to think this is a very touristy place, since the dishes were brought out literally 2–5 minutes after ordering, which is kind of a plus, but the quality is a minus. There are much better places where you can spend the same amount of money (on average €30–40 per person) and get what you expect, or at least something close to it.

From the menu, we had:
•	Paella – it looked good and was quite good.
•	Grilled salmon, served with a salad of lettuce, carrots, and corn. The salad itself was okay, if not for the expired vegetables.
•	Pork tenderloin, served with French fries. Overall, not bad.
•	Caesar salad didn’t really resemble a Caesar salad, including the dressing. Again, the vegetables were a bit tired.
•	Jamón with melon. A separate story — the melon was cut into cubes and sprinkled with finely chopped jamón (not thinly sliced, but finely chopped like onion for meatballs). It’s served in an ice cream bowl. For the €11 this costs, you could buy 300 g of jamón at a supermarket plus a melon and eat your fill.
•	Bone broth. I tried it for the first time, but if you don’t want to experience a “pork kingdom” in your mouth, try something else.
•	Ice cream. Instead of butter, milk, and sugar, it felt like plastic and water were probably the main ingredients.
•	The wine was good.
•	The bread served with single-use packages of olive oil and vinegar was tasty. I’ve never seen oil and vinegar served this way before.

In February, when we were here, it was most likely off-season and there were few tourists. Whether that’s the reason or not is hard to say. The last time we visited this same museum, everything was 3–4 times better. This time, my wife refused to eat the melon and didn’t even look at the broth. And even I, being someone who eats almost anything, was chasing it with bread after just two spoonfuls.

Maybe next time we’ll try the assortment of 5–6 types of jamón, which costs around €34.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCkBZ0TpZ0nxrIpVfse64Um&fid=0x0:0xe3b77b0c922a34c3"],"When":"2026-2-7"},{"Name":"Kristie Park","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUFHqp730XGmbR5YV-LN7QvDrr1YvJlS45e8V5I8RvP0dgXIg8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Museo del Jamón is a charming little place that's perfect for a casual stop. The bar has a great atmosphere – lively, no-frills, and very typically Spanish. It's a fun spot to sit, have a drink, and soak in the local vibe.

The food is decent – nothing too fancy, but it hits the spot if you're after something simple and traditional. The real highlight is the bar itself: quick service, affordable prices, and a wide selection of jamón and cold beers.

Overall, it's a great little bar for a relaxed break. Don’t expect fine dining, but do expect a solid experience in a very local setting.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB17U6R5-YgbXCIhvzw1w-M&fid=0x0:0xe3b77b0c922a34c3"],"When":"2025-9-7"},{"Name":"Pusher Pushkin (PusherPushkin)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWpohyFWetY5qV5vANpyjlOC50iNbB9atVJ_3FA6R7ecKuc-xs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had an amazing stay. There is a pretty nice dine-in area upstairs. The food was great and to our surprise not overpriced. Even tho it was very busy the Service was attentive and the food came quite fast. Definitely recommend it for a Madrid trip.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDi9lvNM4sS0iBcv4Sa1BKI&fid=0x0:0xe3b77b0c922a34c3"],"When":"2025-10-7"},{"Name":"Reyhaneh Askari","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXEhp3QZKl3Ngox6mFb8gwV7wvkFLyGsezdWd2p7aN6jRSo1X5z=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The experience was okay, I wouldn’t say that I was impressed or disappointed going there. The food was okay, nothing out of usual. We tried the Jamons, cheese and tortilla; they were good but not exceptional.
I liked the vibe and the history of the place rather than the food. I’d suggest going there for a short stop","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCoSqbDLKHTvFGuQaHx2SYN&fid=0x0:0xe3b77b0c922a34c3"],"When":"2025-10-26"},{"Name":"J • B •","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXBWAWO7EoBBo7W_Sj0EoHtDptmWPPmQXFh3GUZ8Q8-98Oul6Ui=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Museo del Jamón on Calle Mayor is chaotic perfection and a touristy Madrid experience. Jamón legs hanging like art, beer flowing fast and bartenders shouting orders with charm. A caña and a plate of jamón ibérico here feel timeless and unapologetically local 😂. It’s not fancy, it’s real and that’s the point. Anyways, fun even for dropping by and just seeing it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD_ReOqYSKCXgikyP7pJNXV&fid=0x0:0xe3b77b0c922a34c3"],"When":"2025-10-17"},{"Name":"colin Harris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUfjUl9BjvHdnlpWz4UoTgDV9_vnlFATqP1PFJbIdcriXCWHOc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"We visited the Museo del jamon located in Calle Mejor 7, near Plaza del Sol Madrid. After a long day walking we wanted to sit down and relax for a few minutes with a snack and drink. When we entered the colleague was really welcoming and friendly and stated we could eat upstairs which is the designated area for eating a proper meal not a quick snack. The waitress upstairs who served us queried why we were upstairs for just a snack and drink. She was not friendly and welcoming despite the fact we offered to go downstairs or eat and pay quickly. We ordered Patatas Bravas which when arrived was smothered with mayonnaise? not the traditional way to present this dish. We had it changed,which was fine and the replacement dishand drinks were good. Another couple were allowed upstairs for a snack like us and the same waitress was not happy with them either and appeared to upset them too. VERY BAD. The issue here is 1, the restaurant wasn't busy, so we were giving them business, 2 it is not our fault that we were sent to eat in the restaurant area by another colleague. 3 customers should always be treated friendly and respectfully and be made to feel value. There is plenty of other  dining options in this highly competitive area if Madrid","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ferhat Yildiz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWV6W2gfwUqAFIDgffx1HATO6JsIPotrLYKf7X6lAbflWpp-7tw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I stopped by Museo del Jamón for a quick bite and the food was quite good — I had a croissant with cheese and jamón along with a cold beer, and everything was fresh and tasty, perfect for a light snack. However, the service was a bit disappointing. The staff barely communicated, offered no guidance, and there was no clear explanation on where to sit or how the process worked — you basically have to figure it all out on your own.

It’s a nice place if you’re just there for the food and don’t mind a self-serve vibe, but don’t expect much in terms of service or hospitality.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCo-a2sPw&fid=0x0:0xe3b77b0c922a34c3"],"When":"2025-4-18"},{"Name":"Marcus","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIZY2VcWRnrqCWyZy7NgSqAZsEzbS9knJDRqqAv9Et4HGt4Mg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Service was very fast. I ordered one plate of the best jamón ham and spent 16 euros for it. Not too bad. Taste was succulent.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAfb_WWufn3loM3hN9clPtv&fid=0x0:0xe3b77b0c922a34c3"],"When":"2025-8-13"}]

[{"Name":"Jallouf Kim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWq1wooNouztzrP27L42tA3_wMQq6deJ9Z2jGEcYxB8MbxATQsDdA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"One of the best places in Madrid to eat, enjoy, and truly taste jamón.

The service was extremely fast despite the huge number of people in the place. Both the waiter and the waitress were very friendly, welcoming, and always smiling, which made the experience even better.

The food was excellent. The only small downside was that the amount of jamón was a bit limited, especially considering that I ordered a *ración* portion. That said, the quality and taste were still very good.

Overall, it is highly recommended and definitely worth a visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDDXcgq_e7XivK9Z_W9H7d1&fid=0x0:0x4b6efe15ae279974"],"When":"2026-1-29"},{"Name":"Steven","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWpPgljaYKz4vhBoReo83vlzaQTO0ll-SmRpAtDjKtaNPU6tVB6=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The seafood paella was delicious here! The service by this Filipino lady was amazing and she’s very nice! We order 2 dishes and there was a lot of meats!! Some of the shrimps wasn’t fully deveined

They do sell a lot of iberico hams but you can typically get better prices in grocery stores

We can’t say much about the other food options but the 24 euro for a 2 person paella was a decent deal for a street full of tourist traps","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCxex8ZxBd5Sfa8rJ2WcEFh&fid=0x0:0x4b6efe15ae279974"],"When":"2025-9-21"},{"Name":"Georgios Karaferis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJz0ax4y2OckSn6HYp10uxtenruZQOchgStaG3dHfGp8yW89A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We came in during the rush hour without a reservation, but the staff was incredibly friendly and found us a table right away. We went with their house recommendations, and every dish was excellent!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB7R0NhpU5Bfqu2Ek-YOyvs&fid=0x0:0x4b6efe15ae279974"],"When":"2026-2-22"},{"Name":"Danny Shin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUJRrEa7i_2NCzRnc07db30KbI3MWip68sPL7c9TRs_qv3E4C8_Ng=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is absolute must-visit! You simply cannot beat the incredible value here.
Being able to get a 2 beers plus a delicious jamon tasting for just €5.99 is truly fantastic and makes it the best budget stop in the city. The jamón is high-quality and the whole experience is a fun, authentic Spanish treat.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDYSE8cSvR-8kbEuw9nD8xk&fid=0x0:0x4b6efe15ae279974"],"When":"2025-10-20"},{"Name":"K Li","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocICeSPjRGt-Nt8UrhC_e3xU8rPWhQAIuEfkDLBgq2B-x_OX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Spent an hour here with my favorite iberico ham platter, and I love Jamón ibérico de bellota 50% the most! And the Radler lemon beer is so refreshing.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB9uvw6mY4FLM6ZzkZr1c-3&fid=0x0:0x4b6efe15ae279974"],"When":"2025-12-9"},{"Name":"sissy z","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUjvopW8VNlNmw6IlFYUW88y4Oyq4V2WAKapeQzt7JfHrzBoD8A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Loved it, good food, service was nice too, the waiter heard me speaking Italian so he started to speak it with us. He explained the type of the jamon we ordered and the 75% iberico bellotta was outstanding, best jamon I ever had.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAFhYY6iAUDHo1ipfzW6doR&fid=0x0:0x4b6efe15ae279974"],"When":"2025-12-30"},{"Name":"Robert Kief","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUlFUpdLhZJ_ZFAmJcnwNskDN7HXT2FiUeoTlTNM1P5l8yP-o0b=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This looks more like a deli that a restaurant. [{"Name":"JMatos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUoqlVEjs7EL0Ypcxub1L2t2jf-dh9lnZfiuzZinDiYSlVGhYDDfw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"It’s ok, but the staff are not always welcoming nor helpful. They seem they don’t like their job, so they don’t care to treat people kindly. Furthermore, I presented a request to lower the volume that was too loud, sometimes reaching 89db or even 97db! How come the staff simply do nothing to sort out a problem like this! There were at least 5 children watching the movie under this so UNHEALTHY ENVIRONMENT!!! Yes, because being exposed to such an UNHEALTHY situation for about 2 hours will bring hearing loss certainly. No doubt about that! And it gets worse, because 25 minutes later the employee I had talked to him before simply did nothing! And when I approached him again to say that I was leaving the screening room because I couldn’t stand that TOO LOUD VOLUME anymore , he only said: “I thought they have already sorted out. Do you wanna write a complaint?” and he and his peer just laughed. Unbelievable! As I say to my folks: don’t go to this awkward cinema, because it’ll not be worth it. If you have other options, pick the other options and avoid this one.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICHtIajwQE&fid=0x0:0x5bf6cfa71a49f45c"],"When":"2024-9-1"},{"Name":"Etienne Maricq","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWjYkr1lsQz_EAW1VKP7X6ZU_hf2k9m0r66YrT3MF7BR3nnEe8n=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Took me several intents to register in the Cinesa iOS app that looks like it could get stability improvements.  The cinema facilities are ok, with subsidized underground parking and a few choices in the food court. It’s main merit is the range of original versión movies. Saw The Mule by Clint Eastwood in VO of course and the theatre was packed
Sound quality is ok, the elevators though are a little slow and too few of them","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID4_9ugsQE&fid=0x0:0x5bf6cfa71a49f45c"],"When":"2019-3-9"},{"Name":"Desirée Zhang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW1eBPC4O0m3niQE-hQ5-sMZKzE5QkmH4sEagZqR1dGU6nbCvNh=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I used a 35% coupon from LIDL!
I found out from the APP that there are promotional activities for LIDL after registration. You can enjoy a 35% discount when watching movies. The operation is very simple. Copy the discount code, then click the link below to select the cinema. Remember to paste your coupon as the price will change. After checking out and receiving the electronic QR code, you can go directly to the cinema to enjoy it!
The cola and popcorn are really huge. I simply can't finish them all!
I suggest not filling it up so full. It might spill out, especially if it falls into the elevator, which is very dangerous","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDiz-uq6M2RZJX3t684QwH_&fid=0x0:0x5bf6cfa71a49f45c"],"When":"2025-7-1"},{"Name":"Alexander Belochkin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXHmUeAN5MO1lsv1FCF3_NmtiMje8muM_JQtnxEQ-aTRyEpYmq7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"What a poor experience we had.. It’s hard to believe but we were waiting for additional 20 minutes watching various advertisements (cars, butter etc 😵‍💫) before movie finally started. It made 25 minutes in total as we came 5 min before the indicated beginning time. The other people seemed more experienced and were coming later causing a lot of discomfort though.
It would have been better if XL sala could impress but it didn’t.
Lastly, paying almost 6 euros for parking (discount included) made it all even worse 😑","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Iago Ciotkowski","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLnEx-HO0nppATgfphy-4LhcT10B29x-fHDxyus1kaYr6IaWA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very big cinema. ❌MANAGEMENT: THIS IS UNACCEPTABLE in the 21st century!❌
Pay for car park on level - minus 1  but I couldn't reach level - minus 2 by stairs as door was locked from one stairwell.⛔🆘 ♨️ MANAGEMENT :YOU NEED A NEW EFFICIENT ELEVATOR!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Víctor TP","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWjXJe97L0aE_8bIs9VlL0vbReVvdVjh5W9q8Kpj7eacLhdoq6IWA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It's good to spot places where watching movies is not so expensive (around 4 euros less than the Spanish dubbed versions). Totally worthy! 🍿","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jean Francois Forgeot d'Arc","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIlUx-OaCiAidPUIRf6Rydxc14XuxMV-fQ52fzfRo0CLRxygEuM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Large screens and greater choices of movies. [{"Name":"Jhon Kensington","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUZU1YBDENQnvtQt2VLmO7r20vZwz3n5xYys4noMhqedoHQ_Ak=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cinesa Proyecciones offers a fantastic cinema experience in the Cham berí neighbourhood. I've visited several times and each visit has been thoroughly enjoyable. The screens are large with crystal-clear picture quality, and the sound system is superb. The seating is comfortable with ample legroom, which is particularly appreciated during longer films. The staff are professional and courteous, always willing to help with any queries. The location on Calle de Fuencarral makes it extremely accessible by public transport. They show a good variety of films, from mainstream blockbusters to original language versions. [{"Name":"KP G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX2Rg9DiQ29ajhUkI-XwqOIh23_chg3Bw9nylChO9JBI-09zvil=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fabulous small cinema, showing good variety of films, including charming older films (Like Cinema Paradiso).

When I was there in January 2026, the showings were 17h (5pm) or later, weekends only.

Theater is small but comfortable. Felt like a speakeasy, due to location. You walk down a small path to get to the entrance, at the side of an apartment building.

Blink and you’ll miss the path to the entrance. Look for the sign with movie schedules at the head of the path/sidewalk.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBsxAXkk7GhjnB9mwaDbmBR&fid=0x0:0x8827f3323d8e608a"],"When":"2026-1-21"},{"Name":"Geoff Marshall (Geoff M)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLFsK-oHNx3harVywAojKLdP8J_WuhShUkfvh5MjRtcZyvhonk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Small intimate film theatre, don't expect the usual hollywood schlock of tacky blockbusters and popcorn. This is for discerning movie goers.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kevin Peakin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXvUv6jHNsihS8YLYBW2zfuvgWlhnm_pH_TmLXvUAODdMddAjU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great experience nice staff","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Duvalié Carbajal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVKSnmtWKgW0YvE-p0gKiH-ZpnyXiz8GWO49xmF-4olTtOk1fKq=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ana Conda","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIhui12yu5U-fbOqmaRme1twKx0_XGHnwSLOyABr0h3lv73Zg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Una maravilla de Cine Estudio  con  una magnífica programación, un sitio intimista para cinéfilos. Ayer estuve viendo "The Chronology of Water". El personal de la Sala encantador. Lo recomiendo totalmente.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC9-HJGf0lddm6xVsDnYgOH&fid=0x0:0x8827f3323d8e608a"],"When":"2026-2-15"},{"Name":"Juanjo Castro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWw4z226uLeYvTHnPaNG6_E7msO5biqdhVyQb-hiRkl336OwaM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Va a hacer un año de los pases de 7291 en esta sala.

El Pequeño Cine Estudio ha tenido conmigo un comportamiento como exhibidor que dista mucho de la ética y de lo legal. Tal como hice público en su momento, continuó proyectando mi documental 7291 sin mi consentimiento y, aparte, se negó a pagarme la cantidad de taquilla que me correspondía.

Al ser imposible percibir este pago con las condiciones acordadas, presenté una demanda en el juzgado. El hecho de ser un profesional independiente, que no necesita tratar con ellos inevitablemente en el futuro, me ha permitido denunciarlos sin temor a represalias empresariales.

Finalmente, y ante la perspectiva evidente de que iban a perder el juicio (y por tanto, de que deberían pagar los gastos derivados de este procedimiento), el Pequeño Cine Estudio se ha avenido a saldar la deuda.

La vida es justa de vez en cuando. Y en este caso lo ha sido: los dueños del Pequeño Cine Estudio han tratado de quedarse con un dinero que no les pertenecía utilizando unas maneras soberbias y arrogantes, y se han enrocado en su postura durante mucho tiempo porque se consideraban impunes.

Estoy feliz y aliviado por ello.

Al Pequeño Cine Estudio no lo hace pequeño su nombre sino sus dueños.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"juan carlos hurtado delgado","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWby7_BNwEkzVljJUVi9duEDACxlejWzxhGP5-PSuRagtmhKI3AIg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Después de casi 40 años , volví a entrar en éste Pequeño reducto de Buen Cine.
Además con un Clásico de Elvis.
Creo que es la primera vez, que veo a Elvis en Cine.

Muy bien, además con el peludo y mi amigo Grandes Seguidores del Rey.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDY7iSzkodPBIaNv6ALd2IS&fid=0x0:0x8827f3323d8e608a"],"When":"2025-7-29"},{"Name":"CASTRI","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUjU-rDL6C6F-tsTQEqBsDOpAnS6mVIPnEo7LaqXI3bJ6sqglM_6w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Sitio fantástico para disfrutar del cine. Una sala de "las de antes" que aguanta el paso del tiempo. Hubo una época que los cine estudios como Groucho, Fantasio, Falla, Los Angeles o Regio, hacían de Madrid un encuentro cultural para el cine absolutamente diferente al circuito de estrenos, con programaciones especiales, mejores precios, sesiones triples y películas diferentes. Cuidemos el Pequeño Cinestudio y disfrutemos de su sala porque es "El último de Filipinas".","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID346GKsQE&fid=0x0:0x8827f3323d8e608a"],"When":"2024-11-18"}]

[{"Name":"chen levy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL0QgD_gqTlXwKtBpxuK407GKy3lqZEDZXO6CULgXQaOd1WKQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A cool VIP cinema with a warm and cozy viewing experience — it truly feels like watching a movie at home 🎬
Super comfortable armchairs, a relaxed atmosphere, and kind, attentive waiters who make the experience even better.
Perfect for a fun, pampering movie night. Highly recommended! 🍿✨","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCgzNsTG7JnNA_GWKyO6qK0&fid=0x0:0x86ef21c474b2f305"],"When":"2026-1-8"},{"Name":"Rainer Sebus","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJi6TkIePwKambaOwGyHkYGDn6wdDxMz8LVd33IqYGg9ivfqQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great cinema y exceptional experience

We like this cinema, comfortable seats, luxury menue and in cinema service.

But today I’ve made a very special experience:
I forgot my wallet during the last movie. Not only they found it, they shared they phone number and whatsapp and informed me!
But not only they did all possible to hep me - the content of my wallet was complete and nothing was missing!

Thank you to the whole team for saving me and for being so incredible reliable, honest and friendly! You are an example!

Best experience ever!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chris Noble-Beeck","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWFNyIuz4uLoClMLsJ2-CMtxYIiGSeiXqzAiwnE8hhQroQ2w18IOA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"This was my inaugural experience viewing "Avatar 3" in a Spanish-subtitled theatrical presentation and first time at the lux super theatre. The cinema's entrance presented a remarkably clean, aesthetically pleasing, and sophisticated ambiance. However, upon entering the theater, I noted the restroom facilities were singularly located at the rear of the premises, necessitating a considerable walk from the main viewing areas.

I appreciated the convenience of in-seat food ordering. Regrettably, the burger I ordered, despite requesting it medium-rare, arrived significantly undercooked. Furthermore, although I had arranged to receive my crepe after my meal and subsequently utilized the service button to request it, it was not delivered until near the conclusion of the film.

A significant discomfort throughout the screening was the excessively warm temperature within the theater. It felt akin to a sauna, suggesting either a lack of air conditioning or its operation in a heating capacity. This, combined with the faux leather seating, resulted in considerable discomfort for patrons. I strongly recommend activating the air conditioning and potentially offering blankets to those who may find the temperature too cool, as the room was uncomfortably hot by the end of the 3.5-hour film, including advertisements.

The staff, however, were consistently kind and polite, which is the sole reason for the two-star rating. Aside from the commendable service, the menu and food quality were unsatisfactory.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Howard W","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXwehXjkfqD3sZjAAgJUj7akN1KRtboTR08co9cNaRjeu3AlaU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The cinema is great. user_reviews: [{"Name":"Jhon Kensington","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUZU1YBDENQnvtQt2VLmO7r20vZwz3n5xYys4noMhqedoHQ_Ak=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cines Verdi is an absolutely charming independent cinema that I thoroughly recommend to anyone looking for a more authentic film-going experience in Madrid. Located in the Chamberí district, this cinema specialises in showing original version films with subtitles, which is a real treat for cinema enthusiasts. The atmosphere is relaxed and welcoming, quite different from the typical multiplex experience. The screens may be smaller, but the quality is excellent, and the seats are comfortable. I particularly appreciate their carefully curated programme of independent and art-house films. The staff are knowledgeable and passionate about cinema. The ticket prices are very reasonable for central Madrid. It's a lovely spot for anyone who wants to enjoy quality films in their original language.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Benjamin Eg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXdvuhpybsr5HUT5xosEciNsCpupXrkfHEFhaFjJfwBvtjmUXc8iQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A really really cool and retro cinema. Prices are fair (though you must use at least 6 euros in order to pay with credit card at the snack shop) and the screens are good.\n\nThe only bad thing, which is a major thing to me and I really considered giving three stars, is that the service is incredibly bad! Not one smile but instead a lazy and rude attitude from the staff! Especially those at the snack shop! Such a shame.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID4mdm0DA\u0026fid=0x0:0xe974329bf008c9bd"],"When":"2017-1-29"},{"Name":"Duke (Duke)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU1xhwxEpkF0JRMq-k-cRafWMJJH8FEmJkh9qpQnujYG5Pbj6ZX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The website does not work at all. This movie theater is an absolute must-see for all lovers of the Seventh Art.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD28WIQmUJ5SpSIbTCnXeKC&fid=0x0:0x19c0f490421bfff4"],"When":"2025-11-9"},{"Name":"Monica Taneja","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKfaoaqidbSFeMXC2Vp7B9BF6U4KV_suubNbG4K8BlrQidGrg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Must do for cinephiles in Madrid! Showing a mix of old spanish or American movies. American movies are shown in english with spanish subtitles. Tickets are currently free, but you have to go to the box office 2 hours before showtime to get your ticket and they will sell out. Timeliness is very important and they don't let it late comers.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Iva Opacic","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKWqpiH_An96Xz8XjuBV86i_AsYU6Hq-aEkdF4AA6rPCAYbeg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really special cinema. We liked watching old movie in old cinema. No food or drinks allowed inside. Box office opens 17:00 h. I think it is 3e for entering. We saw a movie for free I think because it was a film festival. 2/3 of tickets they sell online 1/3 is left for box office.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDw8Oj_Kw&fid=0x0:0x19c0f490421bfff4"],"When":"2025-3-22"},{"Name":"Vivian Rizo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKC3FQZLEytRYI4vw8hGLdUjs8FQlqwZOLceoZdOzMWXUWe0A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"beautiful theater. there are ongoing renovations right now (oct 25) so the tickets are free! check online calendar to see which movies are playing. cafe is temporarily closed. ticket office is on the right side and is open at 17:00 tuesday to sunday. there’s a bookshop next door. arrive 10-15 minutes early. the temporary entrance is at the door on the left side of the butcher shop. no late entry!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Samuel Viñolo Locuviche","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVYUTiOdFMcVSx6iiu8NCB-0zV_lgfHyCTcAwKWAnuOZXK_GFqSyQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Cine Doré, the oldest cinema in Spain, is a beautiful venue with two screening spaces and a cosy cafeteria, which hosts all kinds of films -old and modern- and film seasons at very affordable prices. Tickets can be purchased online (up to 5 days before the screening) or before the screening (they always keep 1/3 of the tickets for sale on the spot). Sometimes the screenings also include a presentation or a talk with some members of the film crew after the screening. Foreign language screenings (non-Spanish) are always shown in O.V. with Spanish subtitles.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDD3bnt0AE&fid=0x0:0x19c0f490421bfff4"],"When":"2024-4-13"},{"Name":"duckula","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLU4kGEu5HaYhUn84EL2J4lbEpuOzyAj8wjnZKsCOlFVICB8-E=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is the box office to get your tickets from 16:15 onwards. Located at the side of the building along the street. Check schedule on their website but tickets can only be purchased on site here.

👉 Attached pic of box office window. On the right where the guy is standing.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID0-5SX4AE&fid=0x0:0x19c0f490421bfff4"],"When":"2019-10-26"},{"Name":"Bruce Taylor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7ZwHZwFAz7oGQiiCRnTeGw1mE0t4nGp5ZiI-jZsBc8uTP2D5i=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Update 2024: We went for the first time to a film (Neil Young´s Heart of Gold) on the open air terrace at 22.00. A great experience.

2023: Hadn´t been for a long time. Great cinema showing classics on big screen in Sala 1. Beatifully renovated with films in VOSE original with Spanish subtitles. Also great value.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICrvuCEKw&fid=0x0:0x19c0f490421bfff4"],"When":"2024-7-7"},{"Name":"Pedro Nogueira","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU3KtjzYDy7zOyqvrxcHWoCSJPF2abNqn0pWekF-a4oFXGUf2eN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"More than worth it and for only 2,5 euros or free, depending on the screening. [{"Name":"Aury","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVEIVbbZDNE5Gulwyqp_mLp_hg-01i2PryDZDkiTdsgju_x-0Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Last November 14, 2025 my friends and I went to this venue to Los Morancos show. The facilities are in good conditions as well as the sounds. We are in the 2nd floor and we heard the whole show very well.
Los Morancos Bis a Bis show was awesome. We're not from Spain and always wanted to see Los Morancos
performance.
It is a prison comedy in which the Cadaval brothers end up in jail due to a new law restricting humor, called the "Mustard Law." Inside prison, they must adapt to a hostile environment while their characters, such as Omaita and Antonia, try to devise a plan to free them, which only worsens the situation and generates humorous moments, current events parodies, and musical numbers. We laughed a lot and enjoyed the comedy as well as the songs. We had a really fun time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCh21rcDuq9DOJYjJC8NMeu&fid=0x0:0xbcb7415d51079e00"],"When":"2025-11-30"},{"Name":"Esther","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVw0VFy_lveSJ2b8wCKy3HjqqyCms0hIPvFYFQIKkUX451INv2t=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Layout of the rooms were weird; I had to go down 2 floors to get to the bathroom + it's not very accessible for persons with reduced mobility, lots of stairs.

Beside this, the space was good, seats were comfy + good quality of sound.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCSqJGlyDsQUrfQt6eJgKLU&fid=0x0:0xbcb7415d51079e00"],"When":"2025-6-14"},{"Name":"AO “Fine diner”","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJq0oEfngTFbaKzFs5xOZA_M5RsXKiWEyxBJnQt5mAy9g_bXQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Well located, small enough to have a good view. They don’t have escalators and there are only 2 bathrooms in one floor, hence there’s a big line to get in, they should fix that asap.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDw2eC6mQE&fid=0x0:0xbcb7415d51079e00"],"When":"2025-3-26"},{"Name":"Kyriakos Cy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV6sIcixwmQACY1Nmt-MKX9-fjeKs-eHJGIye4AgW5cQm9bs9uJWA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Capitol Building in Madrid, also known as Edificio Carrión, is an iconic landmark located on Gran Vía. Famous for its distinctive curved facade and the Schweppes neon sign, it exemplifies 1930s Art Deco architecture. The building houses a cinema, shops, and offices, and its rooftop offers stunning views of Gran Vía and the surrounding area. The Capitol Building is a must-see for architecture enthusiasts and those exploring the vibrant heart of Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICL69SSkgE&fid=0x0:0xbcb7415d51079e00"],"When":"2024-6-23"},{"Name":"Kevin Blackledge","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUYxfgscLO_WNesnd0rdOv_T07aJRB0wZV8Pk3_SQhJ0H4p5WrHLw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We went to see the ballet at this place,  the ballet was the Nutcracker and was excellent,  but finding the place seemed a little difficult.  I would give it 5 stars however because of the lack the information given caused us to run across town I'm taking a star off. There was no indication that the nutcracker was even being performed at this venue.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC1uNzWkwE&fid=0x0:0xbcb7415d51079e00"],"When":"2023-12-22"},{"Name":"Andre","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ8HeBZkxvHh3pYAuHftZiTl7T06cWYIQH_z2bAHh38U6uMV5M=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Went there to see a music concert. Staff was very disturbing during the full concert, always running after anyone filming or taking a picture as if people were about to commit a murder. Very disturbing to anyone trying to enjoy the music. I of course understand there are rules, but the theater management does not need to overdo it and make things worse than what they are.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Debbie Dorman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLvXB5GQs1HAsnCTD9_NvOuuH04lU3W491OKJEpjnbxqwDKtw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Comfy seats. 2° outside and quite chilly inside too. Toilets are in the basement so quite a way away from main arena. The stage was also too small for the ballet we went to see but enjoyable nonetheless. We didn't use the bar, Starbucks is right across the road so avoided the queue by having a coffee pre show in there.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"ngọc phong nguyễn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5F3DIESpoUSb-xY89e8QJLX0OMVNjYMeQDEqj_9CS5j3onDs=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Honestly amazing flavor.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Nicolas Laur","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ0ZS0KPANkEdinPBm0_M7Manax8_2BPecYEyUaogx0ighK7Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"First cinema experience in Spain..
Do your best to avoid aisle seats and make sure other people sit next to you to block out the much too bright blue aisle lights.

Biggest issue is sound, room 11 speakers saturated a lot, quite underwhelming. By that I mean not for loud explosions but most dialogue scenes :/

Movie theaters in general and this one as well let in late people; so you'll be bothered 10 min into the movie by flashlights and/or wake up.

Other than that you feel it's quite a movie lovers theater, cool vintage posters, old cameras exhibitions and nice staff members :)

On a sidenote I was pleasantly surprised by spanish audience, little to no talking and no phones out during the movie. (Although lots of popcorn everywhere and coke cans left on seats at the end despite the bins front and back)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDsVJO-6p68WCKgPa9rQk6z&fid=0x0:0xfa4287b428cbd451"],"When":"2025-11-11"},{"Name":"Teena B T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjURct3MXzRWZQvvv4bcBnVzzpzVnP-bVsmdWVfJysdIwD7q526c=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Small but pretty decent cinema and for a 5 euro ticket, the movie I watched was fantastic so I guess it was worth it. I would happily overlook the theatre size and other factors and will definitely return for more good films if the prices are so generous. However, two stars because something I really didn’t like was the lack of empathy from the man at the ticket counter when I was struggling to communicate with him in English. He made no effort at all, just shaking his head sideways vigorously , expressing his irritation at everything, which I thought was extremely small minded.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dominik Sakowski","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXOKnGAGn98grVcMkOll5kubfeDXEfHVN2ov767BPX9S5-Ead8l5w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I’ve been to better movie theaters in third-world countries. Renoir Princesa’s layout is such that if someone (as long as they're not short) sits in the seat in front of you, their head blocks part of your view of the movie. I’ll also add that these seats are average in comfort, and you’ll have about as much legroom as you would on some economy-class airplane seats. The speakers are comparable to a TV’s built-in speakers—you can get better and more immersive sound quality at home with a simple soundbar-and-subwoofer setup. The screen size is mediocre; I’ve been to backyard movie nights with friends that had larger screens for outdoor projector setups. On top of all this, don’t expect much if you decide to use the restroom during your visit: stall doors without functional locks, non-working hand dryers… a true embarrassment in the center of Spain’s capital city.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Esther","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVw0VFy_lveSJ2b8wCKy3HjqqyCms0hIPvFYFQIKkUX451INv2t=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I expected a bigger place and got disappointed because the rooms were very long so when you're around the last rows, you feel very far and it can get hard to see. Also moving around can be difficult because there is no middle path to go through.
But beside the layout of the room itself, their staff are adorable and the price is okay to see a movie.

Hay que hacerse un ovillo para sobrevivir a la proyección, dado que el espacio entre butacas mínimo, para afeitarse o cortarse💈las piernas.
De los empleados de la taquilla sólo decir que ignorante alguno, al decir que la película había empezado ayer (Mi amiga Eva) y no era así, hasta pude elegir asiento con luz.
Muy triste que la #academiadecine haya premiado al barrio pijo de #moncloa para su sala. Nada céntrico, by the way.
Olvidaba meter la pulla final: incomodísimos los asientos. Mejor que la película dure menos de 90'.
Y de los baños ya mejor 🤐.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Jhon Kensington","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUZU1YBDENQnvtQt2VLmO7r20vZwz3n5xYys4noMhqedoHQ_Ak=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cine Callao is an absolutely brilliant cinema located right in the heart of Madrid. The building itself is a stunning piece of architecture from 1926, and stepping inside feels like travelling back in time whilst still enjoying modern cinema facilities. The auditoriums are spacious and comfortable, with excellent sound systems and properly large screens. What particularly impressed me was how well they've maintained the original character of the venue whilst incorporating contemporary technology. The staff are friendly and efficient, and the location on Plaza del Callao couldn't be more convenient. [{"Name":"Marina Pamies","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3eM6y2aXQklPDTWx7IbxzLOG-tPyEFPDSKr4ZpP_WfKUFenFM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"No sitting at all pre screening, staff a bit rude. No food allowed, cinema experience a bit disappointing","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"S. Sofie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJmS3fbRGPLspRB41d73L72-gJbmR4p9IoyIHzlA9LgX9h1VA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We went here on a Wednesday night to watch “The Apprentice” and were delightfully surprised that the tickets were only 5,9€ - only to find out later (as we literally wanted to come back the day after!!!) it’s only a Wednesday offer.

So guys! Pro tip! Go watch a movie here next Wednesday!

This small cinema is a great place to go. Had a very cool old school authentic feel to it, with the vermillion colored movie screening hall. It’s definitely not one of your modern go-to cinemas with a wide election of blockbusters and quick carbs in the form of ice cold colas and buttery popcorn.

This cinema is like a delightful breath of fresh air. It shows a cool variety of non blockbusters and caters to a more narrow audience. Many movies with original sound (and spanish subtitles) making it possible for travelers like me to relish and enjoy in the newest movies.

The bottom floor was under renovation - in the middle of being painted, it seemed - but the bathrooms were clean and had a slight Hollywood golden era look to them. Super cool and very on-theme.

[{"Name":"Batuhan Ozdemir","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLwENbMWAKwAVvJ7kxmc-nxkbMe8H8wXYEv7-gUVQgVENYu_ug=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As a foreign student here in Madrid, I have been welcomed great. I was having some problems with language however all the professors helps you to over come all the difficulties. Metropolis gives you all the inventory and knowledge that you need to create your art.

Me siento agradecido de ser parte de esta familia.✌","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Zubriq","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVglbPNOphyF2GBs_ntBbFwWbReIcRzlBvs_0WHY_7-6QCyqJ_W=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Las clases en Metropolis han sido una gozada. Los profesores tienen mucha experiencia, son generosos y cercanos. Gracias por hacernos disfrutar del aprendizaje.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDVHVJ_Wt5ZHu6GREi1j7U9&fid=0x0:0x795f440ef4356af7"],"When":"2026-1-27"},{"Name":"norton bombey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWKifgUFh3MDl4FWkDlHLpgOIpUhvZUpJOIiyAukbVE1pk6flM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Metrópolis es una escuela maravillosa. Hice un año de teatro y varios cursos de guion y dibujo y no puedo estar más contento con la experiencia, me ha venido genial y he podido conocer gente extraordinaria dentro del mundo del teatro, en especial la fantasticosa y dulce Paulaner, que me alegraba muchísimo el día cuando me dejaba sus gafas sexys. A pesar de que solo me metí en interpretación por la experiencia desde el principio me han ayudaron un montón a adaptarme y a sentirme uno más. Es una pequeña gran familia donde siempre tienes la sensación de cercanía y de estar arropado en las buenas y en las malas. Buena relación calidad precio, totalmente recomendado si queréis expandir vuestras artes, abarcan un porrón de ellas.
Muchas gracias por todo 😘","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Manuela Paso","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKHSBlqF-sQ5Jd_A_K838SvaccfAalFEpvO-MjK6kfbPdt8-w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Como actriz profesional con muchos años de experiencia puedo decir que METRÓPOLIS  me  parece una escuela estupenda y seria para empezar a formarte que es como yo la conocí hace ya 30 años. El carisma y el saber hacer de Clara Cosials y su equipo estarán siempre en mi corazón y en mi técnica como actriz.
Conocimiento, experiencia y sabiduría a raudales.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDnzLq_dQ&fid=0x0:0x795f440ef4356af7"],"When":"2024-10-3"},{"Name":"Jose","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXPL3zx7tb1RI-N7qnNMRw1VI5u0aOYx0KmOWA8bWe4GsH7_cFZ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Estudio primero de cine y tv en Metrópolis. Gran experiencia en varios sentidos donde no solo aprendes sobre el cine y la industria, también a nivel personal te llevas un aprendizaje. Recomendadisimo.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"alicia moreno actriz.editora","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUeJYBtWejgCDVz81r0hxmhxmTuPFnn_azAwfVMDj_wyVw1ayw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"He sido alumna de la formación integral que ofrecen los 3 años. Después de varios, puedo decir que la formación que recibí ha sido muy valiosa e importante para mi vida laboral. Me ayudado las frases de Clara (docente), de que si lo haces con amor , esfuerzo todo se puede conseguir. Que gran verdad. La formación es muy importante y más cuando te quieres meter en esta industria, si estás leyendo esto y tienes dudas en elegir una escuela, esta escuela aparte de ayudarte, será tu hogar .","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Angel Pan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjULxWTnvIcEee1Pk15DO60wd-7i4Aqd_rBdUzRD0G-KOX4EmgpXgQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Estudié en metrópolis diplomatura en interpretación,   Diplomatura en doblaje, solo puedo decir que son fantásticos, todas las personas que componen la escuela, aprendí muchísimo, Clara la directora de la escuela un encanto, sacara lo mejor de ti 🤗 ellos a parte de ser una escuela, son como una familia, nos ayudamos los unos a los otros, si hay algún festivo o por motivos personales, que perdía tu clase, se organizaba para recuperarla, a diferencia de otras escuelas, no la perdías la recuperabas, una familia, mi segunda casa, si te los estás planteando, tienes que ir a Metrópolis ce, de cabeza 😎 metropolitano ❤️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDXsbqYMw&fid=0x0:0x795f440ef4356af7"],"When":"2024-10-28"},{"Name":"Carla V","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVA4yBpvPsEnDJuCvlnvjn9wrCSi_ELhF_jok_WauemPqwkfnqb=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El mejor sitio para introducirse en el mundo de la interpretación actoral. Para mí fue clave la enseñanza de Clara Cosials, que me acompaña a día de hoy en las clases que imparto. Por otro lado, Paola Pozzo es extraordinaria en enseñar a usar el cuerpo en el escenario (algo muy poco fácil de encontrar). Dos grandes.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Grace Cunningham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJzZHXPKOitq2ssNxxZT8caLmJzVQtlvxKjeqpqZoNzVlh-gy0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had the most lovely time watching the wicked premier double showing tonight the staff was exceptional. I have nothing bad to say about this place. As someone who as worked at a movie theater myself for 6 years I can recognize a theater who cares about there customers and staff.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Beatriz Bassadone","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKP9EYweDzMm26JX5nlOO46hatD07yhjP7z3_pwBlhho_bia7i=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"SUPER amazing service, i was running late and my friends left the entrance guy my ticket and he helped me rush to find my room just in time","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Devansh Joshi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLICIenBzxCJiEqDvLgYsvmvMAyuaQRiiuNTGnw3lRDw_7o=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Overall experience is ok as seats and sound system is good but the screen brightness and pixel resolution is not up to the mark. It is not only this theater I have experienced this same as in Cinesa La gavia as well might be everywhere the screen quality is poor.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marcos García","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVB4eU9kxHjiTMiAkUc5_kvrqaFmLLgeAaF5JWu4OOpdPGFdiT73w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The facilities are good enough. Even if the food is not the best, it's pretty edible.
The lounge is usually clean and busy. Now in the pandemic, it's more quiet but still very clean and tidy.
All the staff is very friendly and wear masks properly.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Diego Mendoza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX6OrGccdkicXi0sIJhfTJ4sAk3VqXdcAFGFg1KFCZy6FLCCrKD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is by far my favorite movie theater. The staff is super nice, everything is super clean and it's very close to Renfe (C5)

Update: Still my favorite movie theater","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Timothy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU01SZZx4xHdf2QGtI80vWvQNAm7jlQ8-fVlhxIyTKdjD_sUzMxPw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"5 stars is pretty fair I think. I’d emphasize some good points about this place:
- this chain of cinemas is really convenient. By that I mean - easy to buy tickets online/cash/or in special “atm” provided inside the cinema.
- because of the good online and “easy to use” system for tickets there is almost no line..
- inside the cinema you can get any food and drinks, even Jamón what was really pleasing for me
- the cinema itself offer good deals of monthly tickets with really good price
- people understand English
- really easy to find your cinema room, ether though it’s huge couple floors building
- toilets are clean","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDp48ibogE&fid=0x0:0xf08e5c586405b565"],"When":"2023-8-28"},{"Name":"Gabriela Segnini","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJJeR_wv1ZxbUIEekO--SNe291VrDn4_-p6BQQSMPJOXdCIWQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Faulty ticket system that gave repeated seats. They kept us waiting for ten minutes before going in, then they gave us bad seats and split our group because of a mistake on their end. We talked to the manager after the show and rather than apologizing for the bad experience, they made xenophobic comments.

Never coming back here.

-Rooms are very small and very close to the screen.

-There are no ramps

-Far too expensive for the very poor service.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Juan Adrián Pérez Sánchez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV8JkhhjxFYyq85c1xF5O1TT1C6xqeYRas5F36HfLvF3gL0HZET=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The place is nice with many movies to watch, the service is fast and everything is pretty clean. The location is a bit weird.","Images":null,"When":""}]

I went inside because I saw a photo of the cachopower sandwich when passing by. I realized it was spicy and asked for it not to be. The sandwich was so so. The cinema specialises in showing original version films with subtitles, which is absolutely brilliant for those who prefer to watch films in their intended language. The screens are intimate and well-maintained, creating a cosy atmosphere that enhances the viewing experience. I particularly appreciate the carefully selected programme featuring independent films, documentaries, and international cinema. The staff are helpful and knowledgeable about their film selection. [{"Name":"William Johnson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKhOuOn_iucrQVf8lq38vHwQAOeGH79fjyXKWWTB3uwr9cxSmKEw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Yet another fantastic burger place in Madrid, this one near Quevedo.

On an extremely hot summer day in Madrid in August, while other places were closed for vacation or simply not a good option because of the high heat, Burnout Burger called my name. This burger place has a dining room below ground that stays cool on excessively hot days, and I was pleased to take advantage of that space.

The service was attentive and friendly from the beginning. And it was speedy too. The basement dining area is charming, although small.

Of course, the main attraction are the burgers. I ordered an IT burger, and “it” was fantastic. A double-smash-burger-patty burger, the flavors were bursting from this burger due to the combination of high-quality beef, house-made caramelized onion jam, and plenty of American cheese. And the bun! The bun was exquisite. The fries are a thinner style than some other places, which I prefer. Great burger experience.

It’s not quite good enough to displace what I believe to be the very best burger place in Madrid, but man, it comes close. Burnout Burger for the win!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCt7l5m9toe1vIcZL0i7yXe&fid=0x0:0xda49b615e6f16c31"],"When":"2025-8-17"},{"Name":"Gustavo Garcia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWB4TUmwxiKUD1owiGBAY5xaQUS8pOpQnjnM6B0qH7hRMLVO17U=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am a wing lover and they have great wings!
It is challenging to find spicy food in Madrid, their buffalo sauce was really good. Mild compare to US standards, but it did the job.
The burgers looked amazing, I will be back to try more of their dishes. Their terrace is nice, must have dinner in order to sit and they have a lot of reservations, best to make yours ahead of showing up.
Wings were on the smaller side, but the full order of ten plus some french fries with their burn out sauce was a lot of food for one.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICZkeaMoQE&fid=0x0:0xda49b615e6f16c31"],"When":"2023-9-12"},{"Name":"Manuel O.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVK82KFgem6c10f3_FHdqWiTlPj0d_RwBZ8QFRrCuwUg6r4hJzS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Small burger restaurant near the Gran Vía in Madrid. Good location and service. Decent size of the patty, but the brioche bun is too small and it makes difficult eating the burger comfortably. Also, the put butter in the brioche (not mentioned in the menu), and I personally don’t like butter!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Aykan Canbaz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXjRkw6SJP9G6pstZg0YBcj3TDdLCRfzAICE45RDvdZoJsCCoXi=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tried IT burger (served with little salad). title: Federación de Cines de España
address: C. de Campoamor, 9, Centro, 28004 Madrid
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"RAFAEL TABOADA SIGUERO","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXB5vaJuxExHt5VE-lX1E3YH_BVUT4atrC6ShDdNWO-vNk9d5o=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Una muy mala experiencia en la sala de Yelmo Plaza Norte de Madrid.

Soy un espectador que se vio muy defraudado en la última experiencia vivida en uno de los cines Yelmo. Publico este comentario después de haberme puesto en contacto con ustedes en su web y no haber obtenido una respuesta, tampoco el exhibidor dio una respuesta en la indicase las acciones para solucionar estos defectos limitándose a contestar casi de manera automática.

Si uno valora la cantidad de problemas que todos tenemos en nuestro día a día, puede que lleguemos a pensar que estas cuestiones son poco importantes, pero si lo analizamos desde el punto de vista de la cantidad de profesionales que intervienen en una producción, los esfuerzos de guionistas y director por contar una historia, el coste de una producción semejante, el interés de la distribuidora por servir un buen producto y, por último, la importancia de la responsabilidad del exhibidor de ofrecer la proyección en las condiciones óptimas al espectador, es entonces muy fácil llegar a la conclusión de que no son temas menores.

El pasado lunes 12/01/24 asistí en la sesión de las 19:30 en la Sala 7 a la proyección de Noferatu, con la Garantía Cine Yelmo que hace alusión a aquellas películas que recomiendan ver a sus clientes por la calidad de la misma, en los Cines Yelmo Plaza Norte en San Sebastian de los Reyes Madrid. Pese a los defectos que presentaba la proyección, nos pudo el interés por ver la película y aguantamos hasta el final, momento en el que pude trasladar estas cuestiones a Diana, la empleada encargada de los cines.
La primera anomalía que quiero compartir con ustedes es que la proyección no cubría la totalidad de la pantalla, que estaba casi más próxima a una relación de aspecto de 4/3 que a un formato de pantalla standard de los utilizados en las proyecciones actualmente.
La segunda es que, aunque con una proyección más pequeña, ni siquiera las convergencias del trapecio de la proyección eran correctas, estando claramente distorsionadas.
Por último, la tercera es que, en una película donde los negros y claro oscuros son tan importantes y tienen tanto peso en la producción, los laterales de la pantalla se encuentran lumínicamente contaminados por las luces azules de seguridad situadas en los escalones de la sala, con lo que todas las zonas oscuras no eran negras sino azuladas y con poca definición.

Las explicaciones de la encargada fueron poco convincentes, ya que trasladaba la responsabilidad al distribuidor argumentando que ellos proyectaban el formato que les habían facilitado. Sobre las convergencias indicaba que era un defecto que conocían y era debido a la altura en la ubicación del proyector y, sobre la contaminación por la luz azul, no dio ninguna explicación.

En resumen, una muy mala experiencia que sufrimos todos los espectadores y que sufrieron todos los que asistieron a ver esta cinta. Desde mi posición de cliente y espectador entiendo que, si el formato o la sala no reúnen las condiciones, la película se ha de retirar de la proyección. El cine es ante todo magia e ilusión y esta falta de profesionalidad y celo en alguno de los eslabones de la cadena crean las condiciones ideales para que los espectadores sigan descendiendo en las salas.

No quiero extenderme más, me despido solicitando que reflexionen sobre la importancia que todos y cada uno tienen en la industria cinematográfica.
Como cliente buscare siempre otra sala para disfrutar en las mejores condiciones de la proyección.

Reciban un cordial saludo,","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alejandro Infante","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWUg45xG8j-u2-TvHBGlv8M_GMmHr8LyFPPwLC8uCgP87KcUyv3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Agustin Llorente","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWEeKFVkfXK-Wapis4sSyWn4RH3LM2n2ez8tEj-nrhW6wMlDEsCDw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""}]

It’s true the screen quality isn’t like an indoor cinema. Was busy for the Barbie movie so I would recommend arriving earlier to get seats together!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDJh-6xHQ&fid=0x0:0xe30621169acdad42"],"When":"2023-7-23"},{"Name":"Carlos Güell Reverter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI9fwjaSDHXh1KmH9qy6ZuW8HuAMTHYQ08w5c5Rw6ZxbNLjwA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Went to watch Whiplash tonight, overall a solid experience but not likely to repeat. My biggest complaint was the headphones, which felt uncomfortable after the movie, especially due to the heat. The chairs also weren't the greatest, but to be honest it was satisfactory. The screen is obviously not one that can be found in a cinema, but does its job. However, it is true that the projector is a bit dark and falls short with movies that have a darker color palette such as this one.
Nevertheless the experience was good and the concert before the movie was neat.

It's a good plan to switch things up, but honestly, what dragged me to come was the movie. Do yourselves a favor and watch Whiplash!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDp2ZDg6gE&fid=0x0:0xe30621169acdad42"],"When":"2023-8-24"},{"Name":"Betsy & The City","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2YXZlEJ6XAaljsyXAK1HAeKdH9ameJx_Lmr_uxdylcdaM3DmgZA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"🍿📽️ Muy buena primera experiencia en este cine de verano en pleno centro de Madrid. Las funciones son a las 22.15h.

Me ha sorprendido ver qué además de sillas hay algunas mesas incluso detrás, ideal para cenar con mayor comodidad (si sois rápidos).

Todo el personal muy simpático. En la taquilla eliges si quieres VOSE/español porque las auriculares pueden cambiar de idioma, un plus.

Después ya dentro del recinto puedes pedir palomitas, bebidas comida, hay muchas opciones como burgers, perrito, tacos, hasta bocata de calamares y menús. ¡Buenas raciones!

🎸🎵  Nuestro pase de Pulp Fiction incluía un concierto antes con banda en vivo, muy guay! Buen ambiente, todos bailando.

Luego empezó la proyección de la peli misma - mola ver una peli tan mítica así en el aire libre, con buena temperatura. Terminó tarde pero lo pasamos genial.

La programación para el resto de agosto pinta super bien, con estrenos y otros pases con BSO!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDfYOk6eMj2BpBMUWpv6il4&fid=0x0:0xe30621169acdad42"],"When":"2025-8-1"},{"Name":"Alf","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWpwxpqkJoXfP3KUW1QiJhz-RxlFZ6JRZM7Z8Zh9pf0RjPOMxIH=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fuimos  a ver por primera vez una pelicula en este cine de verano con estas vistas tan especiales y bonitas como es mi querida Plaza España. Y como no, debía de ser con mi peli favorita Cinema Paradiso!!! una experiencia súper chula!!!puedes comprar las entradas por internet o en taquilla. Hay que esperar un poquito hasta que abren y un poquito más hasta que empieza. Esto si me hizo un poco pesado. Palomitas y bebidas no estan mal de precio aunque la palomita se notaba que no eran recien hechas. Los cascos estaban recien estrenados y nuevitos. Lo que si me decepciono fueron las sillas, son incomodisisisimas. Cuando llevas una hora de proyección  te duele la espalda y el cucu al ser de plástico y sin nada de cojines. Esto creo que una vueltecilla hay que darle. Ahora poder verla en tres idiomas que elijas y poder verla en versión original con los subtitulos en español me parece un detalle genial !!!si traeis más clasicos ire a verlos, recomendadisimo!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICb6cXjMA&fid=0x0:0xe30621169acdad42"],"When":"2024-7-28"},{"Name":"Silvia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUjY9HBxh63qEqXCZYxl7piJ4CX7qLje0ErpbJ0SzDuNpRBmc8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Estupendo cine de verano en la Plaza de España. Para oír la película te dejan cascos, y se puede escuchar en castellano o versión original.
Un buen plan para las noches de verano madrileña.
Además del cine montan terrazas para tomar algo","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDnktPiTA&fid=0x0:0xe30621169acdad42"],"When":"2024-10-4"},{"Name":"Gonzalo Moreu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXLuQtfYJQKFTnk7c5KzttxQ1ViFVEPvDVe2CVItzB-2IH0OGd88w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Cine de verano en pleno centro de Madrid. Buena experiencia visual, con oportunidad de ver películas en versión original o dobladas. Sillas algo incómodas y auriculares aunque prácticos y con buen sonido, nos hicieron algo de daño tras 2 horas. Las terrazas de fuera agradables pero calidad de comida muy floja (bocata de calamares infumable).","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICb6cq5gAE&fid=0x0:0xe30621169acdad42"],"When":"2024-7-28"},{"Name":"Jon Bozz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVHM-SSS3Xx8_8MWf2X8GGwSYN_QnFr4HIaRQQnjahknLN5-J33=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Bueno, nos disponíamos a disfrutar de una noche de cine de verano, pero ha sido MISIÓN IMPOSIBLE. La película directamente NO SE VEÍA, ya que había unos focos de la plaza iluminando la parte trasera y delantera de la pantalla, con lo cual solo se distinguían siluetas y unos guapos barrotes de la estructura. Bastante bochornoso. Espero que nos devuelvan el dinero en un plazo de 24h tal y como nos han asegurado.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDJxvaFuAE&fid=0x0:0xe30621169acdad42"],"When":"2023-7-15"},{"Name":"Elianne Aguilar Arias","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIJrdhA41tApefLU2do5UPtQLK3ltSamtckEiC--NaBepvFbA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"La calidad de la proyección es terrible. Veo que han contestado que es por ser al aire libre pero no creo que sea el caso, no es la única propuesta de cine de verano en espacios abierto pero sí la única con éstos problemas. Si cuentan con una política de devolución de entradas, no estaba correctamente mostrada.  Yo compré las entradas en línea y en ningún lado lo pone. Tampoco lo mencionaron cuando recogí los auriculares. 11 euros por persona por una proyección obscura y sin ningún contraste ni definición.","Images":null,"When":""}]
