user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Into the wild","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWJ4tdDogI88h5-zDEAzSOrDcOLjNakGNX1WKDhcGgOxCQ1d-I=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Walking into Teatro Real feels like stepping into the cultural core of Madrid. The setting opposite the Royal Palace gives it natural gravitas, and the auditorium’s red and gold elegance mixes smoothly with the modern engineering hidden beneath its 19th century look. The renovation in the 1990s delivered the clean, balanced acoustics the house is known for, and the stage machinery is advanced enough to handle ambitious productions with real precision.

Programming is confidently international, with major opera titles, top-tier casts, ballet, and contemporary projects that keep the theatre anchored in Europe’s leading circuit. Operations are polished without being stiff, and the overall experience feels refined from entrance to curtain call.

There is also a modern edge. The photovoltaic installation on the roof has turned the building into a reference point for sustainability in historic venues. It is a subtle but telling contrast to the classical architecture.

Teatro Real is one of those places where tradition, technology, and artistic ambition come together, creating nights that feel genuinely special.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBVP3-MYh0WYdlswNpQ6fuo&fid=0x0:0xa28363ebaaa7adae"],"When":"2025-12-11"},{"Name":"Jack Rowan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUj44WCbMr4sud9dVIxWrbyIfnuNVsl9-WLR-YROdDAOFXyqGq35Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wonderful backstage tour in English by Timothy. Very knowledgeable, generous with his time and gave us a tremendous insight into a pretty mind-blowing theatre.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCYr-l-RwX7Ro-UHy10zRNr&fid=0x0:0xa28363ebaaa7adae"],"When":"2026-2-24"},{"Name":"Miriam Noyola","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVgVIsUixO8fM_KsCIn71tKnKA89l1kvfxvNVIy384yY1fglsC2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Stopped by Teatro Real and loved the energy, beautiful building, amazing surroundings, and spontaneous performances happening in the Plaza de Oriente. One of those places where culture, history, and everyday Madrid all meet.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBeTnWJDLoZl-_EO73qAWrC&fid=0x0:0xa28363ebaaa7adae"],"When":"2026-1-25"},{"Name":"Sveto Rakovic","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXELv1h6KNSxjLBZ4irfEkGKjzrypoUHg3izpRjZZ_yFLu388A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Certainly nice to see, but in my opinion not necessary if you are in the city as a tourist. in front is statue of Isabelle II, also not a must see as a tourist.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAb65lscm-oMU27MSlmJGEr&fid=0x0:0xa28363ebaaa7adae"],"When":"2025-12-31"},{"Name":"Zygmunt G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKNkLPL5Gp69yUUiKsMmnW4VmZBUipJsIYlzaV1IffHmDNofg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It is very nice opera house, and important one on the world's operatic map. Casts are usually very good, and producers like stage and music directors are always better than average. Theatre is modern, accessible for disabled. Ushers & people serving directly to public are nice, friendly and helpful. I had a bad side seat, and I moved to better section. While I was waiting for last moment to take an empty seat, no one was bothering me (not like in Vienna - where to do such switch would be like almost a crime...)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDvv8_XWA&fid=0x0:0xa28363ebaaa7adae"],"When":"2024-12-25"},{"Name":"Мария Винюкова","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVM9e1S363yEckbJibL-ZXDgT3sOXVCEcB4RZVObQFfsYK-27s=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent theater. I saw the National Ballet of Madrid perform and really enjoyed it. Tickets need to be purchased well in advance, and it's best to arrive 15 minutes before the show.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAlKYyQNBDoHE03GFNMBsf-&fid=0x0:0xa28363ebaaa7adae"],"When":"2025-10-22"},{"Name":"S Madani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocISVAMLLdVIr741j0lMNHfJjaWt4i9olBnCFD7OEFB8-IVFPg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Carmen at the Teatro Real
Madrid, 13 December 2025

Don José did not impress me at first. Too swiftly he recognized Micaëla — as if the long and perilous journey of a woman alone meant nothing — and too swiftly he uttered “my mother,” with the distracted reflex of someone suddenly reminded of laundry to be picked up. The moral gravity of the moment barely had time to settle.

Then there was the small but telling detail of the arrest papers: José typing them, only for his superior to present them as if they were his own. It felt oddly Kafkaesque — reminiscent of the Barnabas brothers in The Castle, who insist they are K.’s assistants despite the fact that he has clearly never seen them before. Authority without authorship; responsibility without agency.

And yet — it grew on me.
José grew on me.
By the end, he made me cry.

The card-player with the curly blond hair — Frasquita (or perhaps Mercedes) — played her role to perfection. There was an irrepressible joy in her presence, a love of life that at times seemed even greater than Carmen’s own, lighter and more instinctive, less burdened by fate.

Micaëla’s spectacles and Escamillo’s trousers were striking choices: small visual decisions that subtly anchored character. And when Micaëla leaps from the building with a gun, the moment flirts with simple amusement — but only on the surface. Beneath it lies something far darker: a woman fighting for her life against impossible odds, courage mistaken for naïveté.

This will probably be my last Carmen of the year — after Prague in January, Lausanne in the spring, and London and Würzburg over the summer.

What a work Carmen is.

Muchas gracias.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDlPmbdxFBmgwT0E0i_0kGP&fid=0x0:0xa28363ebaaa7adae"],"When":"2025-12-13"},{"Name":"Mario Ovalle (Dito Ovalle)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVsNi48C5vFzKSe7iBLjus1BgklqVEs5EJzsRS4mPt3I2fQL2vYAg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow, wow, WOW! The building is very well managed, very nice. Seats are comfy, sound was great! I saw la traviata and it was worth it!
You have to buy ticket in advance","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBi0lUqkLKj2D-qnq1SEOht&fid=0x0:0xa28363ebaaa7adae"],"When":"2025-7-24"}]

[{"Name":"Kayla Mallinson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUeoWHWHPSda8CwJdcfakX2zh16oV169w07d_gRwOYWDoqkUdI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best experiences of my Madrid trip. It was so beautiful and stunning to watch. You can tell that all the performers are very passionate. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD3lBEAPp00GWGoO1BtAW25&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2026-1-12"},{"Name":"Ionut Ionescu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9NQsKcGxNOVXPemlaS1mBdvu71OMNXMxZe7YjvXwNSFEYRDpT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Experience the fiery passion of flamenco in a breathtaking show where every moment bursts with emotion and energy. The atmosphere is simply fantastic — a performance you absolutely can’t miss!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBOM3xe-o9xDXUtl_PMc9pG&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2026-2-13"},{"Name":"Alison Holden","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKdWAHXlqWJ5BgbZXSoYCXVQ_8nHFEsttMsirEXbFzy6EJTzF6_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow what a beautiful show!! I first went to a flamenco show in a small theater in Sevilla which I think was a great introduction to flamenco but this show was spectacular! Everything is so well thought out from the costumes to the music to the fog and lighting. You can really see that passion for the art is in every aspect of the show. However, I was often distracted during the performance. People were allowed late entry which flooded the theater with light from the street, 15 minutes into the show. As an often late person myself, I appreciate letting people in who are a tad behind but maybe try finding a way to let less light in would be appreciated. Similarly, at the past show I went to, photos and videos were not allowed, but here they were which I also found distracting from the art. Flash isn’t allowed of course but many people use it accidentally and again, it distracting the magnificent artistry of the performance. At a different show I went to, they o my allowed photos and videos at the end which allows for people to create memories and enjoy the show more presently which may be a good rule of thumb to use here. Again, absolutely stunning performances. Would absolutely recommend to anyone looking for flamenco in Madrid!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBAh0zc1bUxsle6CifV8GUJ&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2025-10-7"},{"Name":"o k","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXwKWYX7xiQuKi6u-ZCex91xfE_g_4B57eo5b51hxUqa7UXQQ4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It was my first time in Madrid and the first Flamenco Show. I really enjoyed it. The show was beautiful. Emotional music and dancing in a cozy small theatre.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDGsObVXkm1gZyU_Ys3fVCQ&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2026-2-27"},{"Name":"Oofrish V Contractor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVI3dFxp6kSwMj92KN7E6vKsZ7_SQBY9sN9EAbCL0LZCYWyD7E=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A trip to Spain is not complete without the Flamenco experience. This theater was cozy with a reasonable size stage and the performances were very intense and authentic.

Best not to go there by car and stay with other transport as parking is very challenging to find even in paid parking garages.

Enjoyed the performances and would recommend them highly.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDk1iAQFCH9mfoHEng8mFoh&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2025-11-15"},{"Name":"Noel Craven","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIFhrqCkqzgZARzXW7vSAXWBb3hEk5FZTog71qIzK4-5gSbDg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was expecting it to be a real tourist trap and not feel like a real flamenco but it was very good . The theatre isn't so big and although doesn't have the Tablao feeling it's still a great atmosphere . The show is very good with plenty of both male and female dancers . One of the guys voices was really great . A real gypsy sounding voice . So yes overall a great show for everyone . The theatre staff were great and accommodated my disabled auntie with a wheel chair without any fuss . You get a free drink with your entry ticket which is good too .","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCCvBqL6JpxZeNJ-w0ziRH9&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2025-10-29"},{"Name":"Rasim Yildiz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWZIqID782Es5zwKoOMtphG64N5GarUP9roukxiisWYOVwGuFM_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We decided to experience local culture by attending a live Flamenco show for the very first time during our first visit to Madrid. We purchased premium tickets for the 19:00 show, which cost us 49 Euros per person, including a drink.

Theater hall was small, and despite weekday, it was crowded.

Our seats were in the first row, giving us a fantastic view of the performers. We couldn't help but capture the mesmerizing moments on video and took plenty of photos to remember the night. The show was absolutely fantastic, and we had a lovely time watching it for an entire hour.

Highly recommended !","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bruce Taylor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7ZwHZwFAz7oGQiiCRnTeGw1mE0t4nGp5ZiI-jZsBc8uTP2D5i=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Oct 2025: Excellent monologue by Argentine actor Leonardo Sbaraglia in "Los Días Perfectos".

Update 2024: Just been back to see the Spanish musical "Tiempo entre Costuras" and was really impressed.

2021: Brilliant play, 'My old friend Cicero' with superb actor, José María Pau. Less spaced apart than in other theatres, although a constant current of air was noticeable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDLoJju2QE&fid=0x0:0x3ae55088f5585e81"],"When":"2024-6-24"},{"Name":"Jorge Espitia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXyNQMon4IiEVUC0wNzlyTTMWuqXsoVuYiWZBb95ASPprIkcvq4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I am not sure if this was a direction from the show I saw, or the theatre itself but once the show starts they are not able to accommodate people in. I enjoyed the performance, nostalgia time for me aside saw the movie when I was 10 years old ❤️
Make sure you are on time!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDA_f7h8QE&fid=0x0:0x3ae55088f5585e81"],"When":"2025-2-11"},{"Name":"杨景贻","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKs2mZ4XmGPeVpWJeqq0m6THyq4sxZO60XCNBeCt6Cvc9jEvQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I came to see this show during my travels in Madrid because the original version of the musical is very famous in my home country. Even though I don’t speak Spanish, I was deeply moved by the powerful performances and beautiful singing of the cast.

Beyond the excellent production, I want to give special thanks to the staff of the theatre for their incredible kindness and support. Before the show started, I had already taken my seat in the Club section, but due to the excitement and energy in the crowd, I experienced some physical discomfort and had to lie down in the hallway to recover. A gentleman in an orange shirt kindly helped by calling the staff for assistance (I regret not being able to thank him in person afterwards—your help meant a lot to me!).

Staff member Marc, along with another gentleman (whose name I couldn’t confirm but to whom I’m equally grateful), came quickly to check on me. Marc retrieved my belongings from my seat and kept them safe, and stayed with me while I recovered. Even though the show had already started, he told me what was happening on stage to keep me included.

Once I felt well enough to return to my seat, they arranged for me to sit in a more ventilated area with no nearby audience, close to the exit, and reassured me that I could come and go freely if I felt unwell again. Later, when I started feeling cold from sweating while lying down, Carmen Brailio Fer kindly brought me my coat and showed great concern for my well-being.

Thank you so much to everyone at the theatre for your care and support. You turned what could have been a distressing moment into a memory of warmth and compassion. This experience made my trip to Madrid truly unforgettable.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"AnaJulia Perrotti","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJpSn9thuzRQOLdXnUOD_vIMl9lUaBkvDUZcZDvIvGdbAUVt79wQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It’s a few meters from the subway station. Nice and comfortable seara. Second floor seats do not have good visibility.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCwwvXeoAE&fid=0x0:0x3ae55088f5585e81"],"When":"2025-3-17"},{"Name":"ReachingSpain4Him","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWd4VlidDuLrGeIVEqiJC3tj1xnTi9IKLAzac7OFS61_Wcolys=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time seeing a show like this.  It was well done and the crowd reactions were amazing.  Seats are a little tight but very nice.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDZlub73QE&fid=0x0:0x3ae55088f5585e81"],"When":"2023-9-30"}]

[{"Name":"Kayla Mallinson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUeoWHWHPSda8CwJdcfakX2zh16oV169w07d_gRwOYWDoqkUdI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best experiences of my Madrid trip. It was so beautiful and stunning to watch. You can tell that all the performers are very passionate. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD3lBEAPp00GWGoO1BtAW25&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2026-1-12"},{"Name":"Ionut Ionescu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9NQsKcGxNOVXPemlaS1mBdvu71OMNXMxZe7YjvXwNSFEYRDpT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Experience the fiery passion of flamenco in a breathtaking show where every moment bursts with emotion and energy. The atmosphere is simply fantastic — a performance you absolutely can’t miss!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBOM3xe-o9xDXUtl_PMc9pG&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2026-2-13"},{"Name":"Alison Holden","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKdWAHXlqWJ5BgbZXSoYCXVQ_8nHFEsttMsirEXbFzy6EJTzF6_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow what a beautiful show!! I first went to a flamenco show in a small theater in Sevilla which I think was a great introduction to flamenco but this show was spectacular! Everything is so well thought out from the costumes to the music to the fog and lighting. You can really see that passion for the art is in every aspect of the show. However, I was often distracted during the performance. People were allowed late entry which flooded the theater with light from the street, 15 minutes into the show. As an often late person myself, I appreciate letting people in who are a tad behind but maybe try finding a way to let less light in would be appreciated. Similarly, at the past show I went to, photos and videos were not allowed, but here they were which I also found distracting from the art. Flash isn’t allowed of course but many people use it accidentally and again, it distracting the magnificent artistry of the performance. At a different show I went to, they o my allowed photos and videos at the end which allows for people to create memories and enjoy the show more presently which may be a good rule of thumb to use here. Again, absolutely stunning performances. Would absolutely recommend to anyone looking for flamenco in Madrid!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBAh0zc1bUxsle6CifV8GUJ&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2025-10-7"},{"Name":"o k","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXwKWYX7xiQuKi6u-ZCex91xfE_g_4B57eo5b51hxUqa7UXQQ4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It was my first time in Madrid and the first Flamenco Show. I really enjoyed it. The show was beautiful. Emotional music and dancing in a cozy small theatre.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDGsObVXkm1gZyU_Ys3fVCQ&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2026-2-27"},{"Name":"Oofrish V Contractor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVI3dFxp6kSwMj92KN7E6vKsZ7_SQBY9sN9EAbCL0LZCYWyD7E=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A trip to Spain is not complete without the Flamenco experience. This theater was cozy with a reasonable size stage and the performances were very intense and authentic.

Best not to go there by car and stay with other transport as parking is very challenging to find even in paid parking garages.

Enjoyed the performances and would recommend them highly.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDk1iAQFCH9mfoHEng8mFoh&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2025-11-15"},{"Name":"Noel Craven","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIFhrqCkqzgZARzXW7vSAXWBb3hEk5FZTog71qIzK4-5gSbDg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was expecting it to be a real tourist trap and not feel like a real flamenco but it was very good . The theatre isn't so big and although doesn't have the Tablao feeling it's still a great atmosphere . The show is very good with plenty of both male and female dancers . One of the guys voices was really great . A real gypsy sounding voice . So yes overall a great show for everyone . The theatre staff were great and accommodated my disabled auntie with a wheel chair without any fuss . You get a free drink with your entry ticket which is good too .","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCCvBqL6JpxZeNJ-w0ziRH9&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2025-10-29"},{"Name":"Rasim Yildiz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWZIqID782Es5zwKoOMtphG64N5GarUP9roukxiisWYOVwGuFM_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We decided to experience local culture by attending a live Flamenco show for the very first time during our first visit to Madrid. We purchased premium tickets for the 19:00 show, which cost us 49 Euros per person, including a drink.

Theater hall was small, and despite weekday, it was crowded.

Our seats were in the first row, giving us a fantastic view of the performers. We couldn't help but capture the mesmerizing moments on video and took plenty of photos to remember the night. The show was absolutely fantastic, and we had a lovely time watching it for an entire hour.

The Flamenco show was such a highlight of our trip that I firmly believe it should be at the top of anyone's 'To Do' list when visiting Madrid. We enjoyed every moment of it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAJ9jaGqJg8vTm3UEJOY4qU&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2025-10-12"},{"Name":"IOANNIS N. PEDIOTIS","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXOKfGv6IXnTSDz9RXP9a6IvJcMeApCTXnGqsc7Dh0kAxNV9CbtYw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing show.....
Congratulations to everyone who tried hard for that unbelievable job.... Especially congratulations to everyone, 3 amazing singers,  3 fantastic dancers and a guitarist with an excellent performance.....!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA7vwnXIo0toUwsZnIOleYd&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2026-2-15"}]

[{"Name":"s.c.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXrgn4VpIM0q8zCKz2bBkYQlOp_aF8-vjg4yRCWueA6DolFfPA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Loved this place. The food is great, very comforting. Loved the daily soup as a warm starter. Rice was a little over salted but this might be your jam so I wouldn’t fade it. I would come here every week if I lived around here just for the atmosphere and music. Jasmine tea is excellent.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAl-xO0bCVUW52poti0nEnX&fid=0x0:0x56d3f38f96f57dda"],"When":"2026-1-21"},{"Name":"Kansala Wanuntho","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWyBz8cIGw1Qdijs-VLE9Q4OQZeaTK5tFx_EdSG9F87NuB-H40y3w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food 4.5 / Services 4.5 / Atmosphere 5
Price 5

The first day I went there for lunch, everything was brilliant. The Xiao Long Bao was so good. The Dim sum del puerto was also nice, a bit salty though.  The hor fun noodles was superb!

The service was attentive for lunch with the two waitresses.

However, on the second day , my husband & I went for dinner. The Dim Sum de Gambas ( Ha Gao) despite its amazing taste was undercooked. The dough was cold. The shrimps was partially raw.

The rice with duck was nice. Love the sauce!

To be fair for the restaurant, the waitress did offer to change the Ha Gao for us but we had other dishes lined up so we declined.

The service for dinner, due to less amount of staff, was less efficient.

We ordered before the two tables who came after us, but end up getting our main dishes last.

At the end, will we go back there? Yes , perhaps for lunch.

The atmosphere is vintage , love it!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA3guoLcasCQ9Gy__NrJAJE&fid=0x0:0x56d3f38f96f57dda"],"When":"2026-1-15"},{"Name":"Ma Christiana Bernardo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKfrhw9CczhXfnZZlb3d3GYWBi0-k3ygwCNoJwgc7LeqZ8mkg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We are just walking around to find something to eat and surprisingly everything we ordered was good. They are also very warm and friendly.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAvIc7CYtLZFUbFH1uoKCY6&fid=0x0:0x56d3f38f96f57dda"],"When":"2025-11-21"},{"Name":"Daniel Eisenberg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLd57DQq1AsgY9dnfX5tBJ0MIsfx7cKmP6ruhDBw5YzPKRjNTn0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Don’t be alarmed as we were at first bu the place being empty, they’ve just gone through a renovation. Thank you to all the performers for such a wonderful and memorable evening!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhADE6dpzms34UYBMWJCBxMm&fid=0x0:0x4d4d96de122e8c77"],"When":"2026-2-8"},{"Name":"Lin Qi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXSRptbCfC5Y2EccSRjXsGF2NmbcjzNonlkVCcTI8GBGi7yROl5JA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Instead of watching, or even after watching, Les Misérables, I kindly ask you to consider helping the homeless man who sits on the same street as the Teatro Rialto. user_reviews: [{"Name":"Erica Fontes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ8WDpF_JMiyYYtIZdcTGosGrK4bBrC0JaVhw-FgyNubEH12Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I had a detestable experience there tonight after the show \"Una hermana para tres hermanos\". Before the play and during the play I had a great experience, but I am evaluating the theater staff per se. They basically kick the audience out and all they say is the mantra \"We have to close\". I am from Brazil and normally vacation in Europe every year. I  love Spain and Spanish people and that is the main reason why I am here, of course. I have never had such a negative experience in a theater building in my life in over the 50 countries I have visited. The cherry on top was a very ofensive line I heard from one of the staff members (the younger doorman) when I said that I hoped he would come to my native country (Brazil) and be very well treated there, because that was NOT what he was doing to me. He said he was not interested in my country at all and for anything. However, many Brazilian tourists come to Spain and contribute to the country at least economically. He (this guy) will not of course affect my view of Spanish people, principally because he himself does not sound or look Spanish. Maybe he has an identity crisis (a problem with Latin America?), which I will never be able to solve. All I wanted, as a tourist from abroad and a woman of the theater, was to take a quick selfie inside the theater I went to on my last night in Spain. I understand now they were in a hurry, because about 10 seconds had elapsed after the show was over and they needed everyone to be out. There was a couple outside asking questions about the show, and the staff people did not even treat them nicely because they so had to go. I also tried to talk to the box office lady who was so nice to me BEFORE the show, but she simply ignored me AFTER it was over. Again, the show was great and I would see it again but definitely not at this theater. And when I told the guy (the young doorman) I was going to write a review on Google about the situation, he replied: \"Haga lo que quiera\". I am not writing so he will be fired or anything of the kind, because he looks like someone who REALLY NEEDS the job, even though he is NOT doing it well. I hope that the treatment of the public will significantly improve at this place and offensive stuff will definitely be avoided.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Manos Koutsoukos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWU6OWv3Ot5bdgHzRQTxrI63nFOZHJ2ry4PwHCQdiAz65uVAn4GJw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Small, cozy venue, perfect to convey the intimacy (and chill) of the play. I'll never go back, at least not to any concert belonging to this festival.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Vivo Vázquez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLvUyRyXlZBRb-TT4BhrnwZ8T78FNkcDjPnfNdsrNdFZg9teg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fernán Gómez Centro Cultural de la Villa is a fantastic venue in Madrid, located just beneath Plaza de Colón. It hosts an impressive variety of theater, dance, concerts, and art exhibitions throughout the year. The spacious halls, modern facilities, and top-notch events make it a cultural hotspot for locals and tourists alike. The exhibitions are often innovative and diverse, showcasing both Spanish and international artists. Visiting Fernán Gómez guarantees a rich and memorable artistic experience in the heart of Madrid.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Nicolai Bustinza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV6R7OhEagLG0aJ_4cRrPGwAEC2iMdu9RuP9l8pj_743_PQbEnwgw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Estuve en el Teatro Serrano, en Madrid, y la experiencia fue muy buena. Asistí a una función y la acústica y visibilidad eran excelentes, haciendo que disfrutar del espectáculo fuera cómodo. El personal fue amable y atento, facilitando la entrada y el desarrollo del evento. Es un lugar recomendable en Madrid para disfrutar de obras de teatro y actividades culturales.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhArg8Lc1Ygf8SnkPhT4Lmrw&fid=0x0:0xd0a20a0af4bcbbc6"],"When":"2025-9-12"},{"Name":"Fernando José Gálvez Sánchez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVk3gTK47bePxjCpuINCgqFHnZdbEyfQ-CguyXvNDY9ZedBTmFg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"He ido dos veces, las obras que vi eran buenas. El problema es que los asientos de arriba son muy pequeños, si eres muy alto (como yo) no entras en el asiento y las rodillas te dan con el asiento delantero. En el caso de los asientos de abajo me parecieron más grandes y cómodos, a pesar de ello, la inclinación de la zona de asientos de abajo es pequeña y es fácil que si estás atrás alguna que otra cabeza te tape el escenario.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"iZASKUN BV","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLxYB7_m5IOOCrsfPCAnDzSTet3IJTeJgfOYI-uudtsW2KymA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Acústica muy mala, no se entendía ni lo que decían los actores. Visibilidad pésima.
El personal de sala permite a la gente levantarse una vez comenzada la actuación para cambiarse de asiento desde una fila a otra precisamente por esto, molestando al resto de espectadores que nos aguantamos con nuestra entrada. Escenario muy pequeño.
Las obras de teatro que muestra son de un estilo moderno-chabacano-surrealista.
No conozco a nadie que haya salido contento de varias obras que ha visto aquí y menos del espacio.
Hay salas de teatro alternativo mucho más teatrales. Esto no es un teatro, es un edificio reconvertido.
La gente apelotonada a la entrada, sin unas filas claras para pasar la entrada.
Muy decepcionante.
No apto para movilidad reducida. No es nuestro caso, pero es algo a tener en cuenta en un teatro.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Fuápete Prodo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUUY0WOd8yvV_N5YCj8zPi2WR-o0sPGXB7NDgm6OCjt-kzztui-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Nunca pensé que los asientos de un teatro pudiesen ser más estrechos que los de Ryanair! Pues aquí los tenéis.
A no ser que queráis salir con artrosis o reumatismo, no recomiendo a nadie venir a pasar la tortura de estar sentado más de 15 minutos con las rodillas reventadas o el cuerpo doblado.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhClGLllNST2l9ZSbQTxcAfB&fid=0x0:0xd0a20a0af4bcbbc6"],"When":"2025-11-1"},{"Name":"CLARA E. RODRIGUEZ","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJL4bc1n5hKj85mV-2lgA-yNtjt-lrMr5HKpvejF2D1iSnKJw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"La interpretación es fantástica. Si estáis buscando una obra purista esta no lo es. Pero la adaptación es ideal haciendo de la obra algo de total actualidad. La recomiendo sin duda.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBc_UpfhC-FCQ7q6dj6CCJR&fid=0x0:0xd0a20a0af4bcbbc6"],"When":"2026-1-17"},{"Name":"Juan Yanes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW-3fJm9_zHbCfZ-teQOv942Ai0dmNmra1EYQmVk-iRJQ_HBOKw3A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hemos ido a este teatro para ver una obra de Yllana, ha sido muy positiva. El teatro es parecido a un palacete, fuera de lo convencional. Muy bien conservado y elegante. La sillas bastante cómodas. Buena visión hacia el escenario. Buena acústica. La atención del personal de sala, muy profesional.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBSTYQLLEEZYuZ0-xrhb7qb&fid=0x0:0xd0a20a0af4bcbbc6"],"When":"2025-7-25"},{"Name":"Yuxing","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX_uRitNyv37NeZqHOKPuV5Ke69yKHqiaWsJ7dqEFURRMMp1RjPow=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fuimos a ver Cloe Quijote de la Mancha de Olga Margallo y súper ameno, divertido. 100% recomendable. Las instalaciones del teatro (butacas cómodas, climatización agradable, baños limpios) y organización genial.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCHJenOn1V1ITvVmy9EeJ03&fid=0x0:0xd0a20a0af4bcbbc6"],"When":"2025-11-11"},{"Name":"Alberto X.B.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVm_pYEkzJGp-kqBKpKF44eaCuRhEVcqhS2pdCjKUvhvIJ8W71x=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Ayer vimos 'La loca historia de la literatura' y nos decepcionó tremendamente, a pesar de lo que el título prometía.
Un humor infantil sin gracia, propio de una reunión de amigos tomando unas cañas, disimulado con continuos gritos y movimientos exagerados, y una visible falta de talento en el guión, oculta con las habituales reivindicaciones "Woke" -"Qué malos somos los hombres, pobres mujeres"-, la consabida Guerra Civil y constantes e interminables matizaciones de género (autores y autoras, herederos y herederas, románticos y románticas...) que alargaban frases y párrafos desesperadamente. Reírse de la calva de un espectador, tampoco ayudó.
La actuación terminó con el obligado "hip-hop" inentendible, a juego con los tiempos, que afianzó la sensación de haber perdido el tiempo -también en el desplazamiento-, así como el dinero invertido en las butacas (muy caras).
Lo mejor, su corta duración: 1h 10m","Images":null,"When":""}]

Tendremos que volver.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDm3cTsEQ\u0026fid=0x0:0x381301d5c2a2d9c0"],"When":"2022-2-6"},{"Name":"Jose Antonio","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIuY9p2gMxmIrLxiwwIgCy4iM8Pb2sLawzcCd2KdJ3v9u1XAg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Bueno que descubrimiento. Buena carta para picar y comer. La coctelería está muy bien en una barra espectacular. Volveremos","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDG0Km-ZQ\u0026fid=0x0:0x381301d5c2a2d9c0"],"When":"2021-11-15"},{"Name":"S López","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKU_TZ_5FwIfVzju-h-X29LcCbA_wY5WD-KTbchblmy9FTlBA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"El restaurante/cafetería es un desastre absoluto. Nos sacaron la comida tardísimo y a cuenta gotas. Cuando un amigo estaba con el postre, otro empezaba a cenar. Todo, después de recordar veinte veces que nos faltaba comida. La cena, sin más, nada del otro mundo. Las porciones de pizza son una lotería. Te puede tocar una pizza enana o una tamaño pequeño, depende de la suerte que tengas ese día.   Pero, atención, lo mejor de todo viene al final. Pides la cuenta y eso es una odisea. Nos cobraron más de diez euros de más. Y digo, nos cobraron, porque tardaron veinte minutos en sacarnos el ticket y estábamos tan cansados de discutir que pagamos de más por no gastar más energía. Ah, se me olvidaba una cosa, vais a flipar. Pedimos una pizza de champiñones y salsa de albahaca. Nos la sacaron con jalapeños. Ufff, otra vez a discutir. Nos trajeron otra, pero sospechosamente picaba muchísimo (como si le hubieran quitado los jalapeños, no sé si me explico). En fin. Que no vayáis jamás a este sitio. Es mejor pedir un Glovo de cualquier cosa y comérselo en la calle o donde sea.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"JOSE MARIA SERRANO OVEJERO","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWYhP5JN6xlaPVuEL09J-SBu25O5ZnnxKTl0rclGSaxCFSFt_yr=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Sorpresa cuando fuimos al teatro. [{"Name":"Daniel Rybnik","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUNKtGLywbk40BuIkwo9LlbJvh3WHDCw2y4ndL4Akr07RS6RyTgag=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Una escuela donde no solo se aprende técnica o texto, también a estar, a escuchar, y a decir desde la verdad íntima.
Blanca y su equipo enseñan con una mezcla acompañan con una mezcla rara -y hermosa- de exigencia y ternura.
Cada clase te deja la sensación de haber vivido algo real, no solo de haber ensayado.
Lamento no poder seguir por la distancia, porque es un sitio al que siempre querría volver.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rubén Curtot","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKd5aIBXfemZcOu-LgezAaYrPvB1znsgBv51SeiMh7I9BkrYw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Esta escuela es para mí un lugar de confianza y de creación, un espacio en el que sé que nunca me voy a sentir juzgado y donde aprendo todos los días. La verdad es que no puedo estar más contento ya que me estoy formando en un ambiente de confianza y de compromiso que me permite crecer como actor y como persona.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"violeta mas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJsUgKj_AuO5n2KiqVeS3N8iwv5fKZdfZMaWwhdyt1MH4kHIQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"el lugar tiene una energía muy especial, los profesores son dedicados y amables, tienen un ánimo de impulso muy gratificante en su trabajo. sin dudas, recomiendo muchísimo este espacio maravilloso para el aprendizaje y crecimiento de cualquiera 🤍","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Orne Delia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ_lZo2yq6fwlB3hIv-cG9FQhb9rxM9B1qAFeJHm48rP5Cdy08=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El lugar es espectacular. Seats can have more cushioning.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"LifeAccordingToVincent","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKXcLQFkYI_HC8eXsiOrq_1aW4n2qIaM0fn3X7GLG3EjpNSYQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The theater is fine, the seats are fine, the artists of course, are beautiful, but there is a serious issue with the person at the cloakroom. She just doesn't know what she is doing. She would have given my coat to someone else if I hadn't looked. She also didn't put any number on my bag, so I had to beg for her to try to remember where she has put it. A scary experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nurece Gunes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVyIHdig1hrRmVl1zmzyeOLBcs6W3u1GeLp43Jg3t_GgBWMNl-MeA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It is a perfect theatre venue to watch zarzuela, opera… The prices of the highest places are low but of course one should know that the visuality is by half reduced. But the zarzuela was excellent, truly beautiful….","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDOmIXHUA\u0026fid=0x0:0xa6446797bd4dab2f"],"When":"2022-6-26"},{"Name":"Jesse Garcia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmSfsD69nIW16Jo97xsejsarQeF7BzlbUjkDS7J7eZ07--1cX3=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The show was one of the most incredible displays of theatre we have ever seen. The Spanish opera was a true delight. We were thrilled that they had English subtitles on the screen, along with Spanish. The more advanced, for purchase, program had an English synopsis of the opera. The theatre is incredible, beautiful, and plush red velvet and gold throughout the space. Our box seats were only 50€.  The singing was excellent and the acting was awesome. The live orchestra was a delight and the choreography was modern and amazing. The opera felt new and fresh, despite being  an old storyline. This is because of the great work of the choreographer,  the set designer, and the director.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"S O","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL5Uc3qYRTJfYUCKO0wQ_7Jv9QNoRebRujETDNywf926R7zeoU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The vibe of the theater was very good.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kevin Arkins","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIAwXC_jlc2GDIq-N_PNTtr3FCrjWsNTD2jrw4hXcVYBpxvpA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful venue, getting a new house lighting system in. Can't wait to see it glow.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Erin Jackson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3AfzWnMiNzvE0iEoIG0yBtajwN9FJEZ0S-BAexIYdR45NsBf8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The theater is gorgeous, and the performance was an incredible experience.  The singers were phenomenal singers.  But additionally they were wonderful actors.   This is not always the case in the opera world.  The costumes were colorful and detailed.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Katherina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVuUP1KJuSNN-X9JNY0ksIXrqyyIUrDV5WPUZa0qV2PCSCYdiqO=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were lucky enough to visit Cabaret musical. I was deeply impressed with the performance, actors and production of the show. Everything was just perfect! Madrid has many great shows but this one is definitely my top! I would like to give my special admiration to Emcee and Sally actors. Such a talented cast. The finale got me in tears. Deserves a standing ovation 👏🏼

I would just like to mention one small thing, the sits are not very comfortable for two hours long show.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCQ4PpD_ECnqn1XREaWlVhQ&fid=0x0:0xdb0b8a0bc443290d"],"When":"2025-11-18"},{"Name":"JL","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIJdjawdOU1mGJpqpHugH7LJtqTKvHFgck6quOTm6tBBJoq2A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We see "Los Miserables" (Spanish version). It can't be better. High quality excelent show. Can't mention a but to this 5 stars musical. "Teatro Albeniz" is a really good theater at the center of Madrid (Tirso de Molina area). "Los Miserables" has been really well adapted to its dimensions and can even benefit from a still bigger stage.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mida Hardo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV181SdyA_6MDM7V8Ixb1lUnrkOAG4BvFRBu9ddqiMfqXH-axw_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time coming here to see the Phantom of The Opera play. The hotel is very nice, the teatre itself is good and a bit small stage. However, it fits the purpose for a great show.
Good seating arrangement, piazza for pictures, souvenirs and drinks area.
The sound system and lighting is good. Definitely, a good place!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICDs-CMGw&fid=0x0:0xdb0b8a0bc443290d"],"When":"2024-4-1"},{"Name":"Graham Edward Parker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWuJMo1Hn1dBGwCdWXu_YyI9M4OZi0AwgAtqecb93AVQLEY_Co=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Concert of Paloma San Basilo. Good acoustics, comfortable seats, and air-conditioning. Theatre incorporates a hotel. Easy wheelchair access with designated area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB1tDPqjn0su1OdJLQco7sX&fid=0x0:0xdb0b8a0bc443290d"],"When":"2025-6-8"},{"Name":"hahparis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW6M-H0YeZHXw94yff22xMDDzfd-89iFgSqRtaU4F82AL-8wUQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Glad to watch Company during the reopening of this historical theater (a great effort of local people to make it possible!). It is recommended to use the toilet before the show as during the intermission the queue is quite long.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICBq_KvxQE&fid=0x0:0xdb0b8a0bc443290d"],"When":"2023-1-4"},{"Name":"Ian Lester","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUoc_Levhl0GKjYsqHMDQpWqttFJPj90LOYIVsp5vfQeWu9LHNc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An absolutely amazing theatre experience...."Cabaret".

Well done to the team.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marina Pereira Lima","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVpAiTF84Sh4SZSzXdfjg_7vARyexzMLzEZhm04Ipq_4_mCZn3R=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a incredible Theather. Excelente locación.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD5lBWuzZ0DkTRJ-V5cLNvG&fid=0x0:0x73144507bb486c25"],"When":"2025-12-13"},{"Name":"alexandra carrillo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL8SvrplBXVUSxWZAegzfyt3vjqepH7m3mLNqXoeNxvue7csA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Excelente lugar para eventos y pasar un buen rato

Tuve la oportunidad de visitar Teatro Bar y quedé fascinada !! El servicio fue de primera: el personal es atento, amable y siempre dispuesto a ayudar con una sonrisa.

Lo mejor es que el espacio es versátil y se puede alquilar para distintos tipos de eventos, desde presentaciones artísticas hasta celebraciones privadas. Todo está bien organizado, con buen sonido, iluminación y una atmósfera acogedora. Sin duda, un lugar al que volvería y que recomendaría sin pensarlo!! 💯🤘🏻","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Raul Sanchez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJsYVh1zI1anXLLYtUaUN1Z-bDvCow-z7crkLX8TrKxTOjpzA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Sitio perfecto para cumpleaños,eventos y para ver actuaciones en vivo tomando cerveza,vino,combinados,muy recomendable,personal agradables y simpáticos, volveré seguro","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Juan Carlos Marques Dos Santos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXUaZx5rIa3kWh84QZ9FxeH5FLkXyhJRBfav513mmgHXAOBqlEq=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El mejor lugar de entretenimiento y eventos de Madrid, he ido muchas veces a eventos privados y shows y la verdad es que cada vez que termina, siento la necesidad de volver. Gracias!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Isabel Rivas Centeno","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJihJyIyM3q7HBIy5bLl1oQUPbVG-ZeRv-0wW2Rck137kSE_g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"¡Una celebración de cumpleaños inolvidable en Teatro Bar!

¡Si estás buscando el lugar perfecto para celebrar un cumpleaños o cualquier evento especial, no busques más allá de Teatro Bar! Recientemente tuvimos el placer de organizar una fiesta de cumpleaños allí y la experiencia fue, sencillamente, ¡espectacular!

Desde el momento en que entramos, nos sentimos acogidos por un ambiente vibrante y lleno de energía. La decoración es fantástica, creando un espacio único que combina elegancia y un toque moderno. Teatro Bar realmente superó todas nuestras expectativas. Es el lugar ideal para crear recuerdos duraderos en un ambiente divertido y sofisticado.

¡Recomendamos Teatro Bar al 100% para cualquier tipo de celebración! ¡No te arrepentirás!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Unifest","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUNk-CPU1I3iOvDtdU1P4s95pXdMAVvkuBQyYuKw4WUVBhfFAk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Sitio perfecto para un evento íntimo y con encanto. [{"Name":"Murat Kurnaz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXf4YYkZmLbR298wNKcW-1MPUhyh9ohOYCw-HRm_dE7u93O0MWh=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"“Stepping into Teatro Calderón is like walking through a century of Madrid’s cultural heartbeat. Originally opened on 18 June 1917 as the Teatro Odeón, the elegant building designed by architect Eduardo Sánchez Eznarriaga rises on the former grounds of the Convent of the Trinitarios.  ￼ In 1927 it adopted its current name, honouring dramatist Calderón de la Barca.  ￼ With over 1,000 seats, beautiful stained-glass panels in the foyer by Maumejean and ceiling murals by Demetrio Monteserín, the venue blends historic grandeur with modern stage productions.  ￼ Shows ranging from musicals to dance-concerts are regularly staged here; ticket prices typically start around €15 for some events.  ￼ Whether you’re a theatre enthusiast or simply exploring central Madrid, this iconic auditorium on Calle de Atocha 18 offers both architectural splendour and vibrant live entertainment.”","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCfe-jAV4uIe1GQGOM2wdeT&fid=0x0:0x532790fe7a68f71f"],"When":"2025-11-8"},{"Name":"L J","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWl7yumBYUimlYOiFYZGSJb1YjrXI10zG0Ui-FCS2_Z6RrU98p8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Incredible experience viewing "La historia interminable, El Musical." I must admit, I do not speak Spanish but the show was exhilarating. Of course there were parts of the story I did not understand but still very enjoyable.

As for the venue, it was good. The view was clear and the area was kept clean. There is one issue which is the leg room. I am average height (5'8") and I felt very uncomfortable during the show. The show lasted two and a half hours. This is a very long time to feel cramped. Therefore, I have dropped a star.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDhq6jtxwE&fid=0x0:0x532790fe7a68f71f"],"When":"2023-3-17"},{"Name":"Nicole Cunningham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9x3i6hs_OpoaEbv5FevvBdCk2ErTm9nzClEO16x0ZRSwsyqR30Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"My partner and I saw Houdini the Musical. It’s a good production but as it’s still new we would say that there are “bugs” to workout.

One of the things they could improve is their ambiance of magic. They tried to have a type of guided tour at the beginning that seemed cool, we got to see various things about Houdini and his life, but in practice was a bit confusing and claustrophobia inducing.

Apart from this we loved the show! Well acted and the music is fun. Spanish is my second language and even though I didn’t understand every word it’s well done that I could understand the plot and still enjoy myself.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"P O","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK1YHysZGv3kGcAwZ-3WwXsmOW96Q3r4Lq60bOTJg0cc7X5WA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was at the matinee performance of "A Chorus Line" yesterday. Hughly disappointed as Antonio Banderas was not in the show! It was a great show with all the performers giving their all.

This theatre is beautifully restored and retained its Italian features. My front stall seat was a squeeze to get in and I'm not big size!

The front of house stall are very friendly and helpful. Definitely worth seeing a show here when you're in Madrid. It's a lovely theatre.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICG_qfSiQE&fid=0x0:0x532790fe7a68f71f"],"When":"2021-10-31"},{"Name":"Jihad Ahmed","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLvIhXwG2CrPp7tlXAYFTyH7AGUM5Y10ZK_kvrg2nWq8BG9ZA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"🕍","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA5ZKVWcFAOqJo9OZd7GGnZ&fid=0x0:0x532790fe7a68f71f"],"When":"2025-12-28"},{"Name":"Sunny Rux","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI0lUs_xuqW8kEWMUWO-6KpLCltnMKMeJpSg75Nf60CxskcAhdk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Comfortable seats ans cozy atmosphere. We saw “La historia interminable” musical and was a great experience, even though Spanish is not our mother tongue. Our 9-year child was thrilled and totally caught by the show, same like us. When we bought the tickets it was mentioned that would last 2 hours and have no breaks, but it lasted 2.5 hours (a 20 minute break was included). Highly recommended both the show and the venue!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICR14OK5QE&fid=0x0:0x532790fe7a68f71f"],"When":"2023-4-12"},{"Name":"Summer A.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWkStxgtyPwdVIJ1k6zDUe9ZikrcD65XzzmzgOE4A98xhEtpMT3xw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Charming theatre with beautifully painted high ceilings that originally opened in 1917. Sitting third throw from the front of the stage was perfect for taking in the scene while seeing the action upclose.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDbrJan_AE&fid=0x0:0x532790fe7a68f71f"],"When":"2024-8-2"},{"Name":"Jose Rangel perez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXKKFaZLPIf4vkdFYQ-bI7pGTWNJAyBl06urtL43x_ChcZPP2yG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a beautiful place. I went to see "A Chorus Line" and the musical was excellent. Will come back for sure.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCw0uzpRQ&fid=0x0:0x532790fe7a68f71f"],"When":"2025-3-17"}]

There are several plays all for them which is great but we found some problems when we went with our two children.
The scenario is good and high enough but the incline of the floor is really not big enough so if an adult is in the row before the children struggle to see, even with boosters.
The sweet shop at the entrance was closed so you better bring your own treats for your little ones.

[{"Name":"Razvan Panes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLP4LcmLXOWctn9CxEvqsT2nJ_hQi3kXLShF5GoebzNTNIndw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nice park to have a couple of minutes in the shade and maybe cool off with some water - great for kids, can get a little crowded in the weekends.

You can use it as a small detour in order to get to temple Debod which is located nearby or continue your walk in the next parks.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAJtgTWqPiPuxOxUo82GAFD&fid=0x0:0xad72a800d76cded7"],"When":"2025-8-4"},{"Name":"Xoom Too","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVLRzhuxFKh1jOBQiJLb1bjferwZ-xPRZ7v7ReqgRp2P_uVyh9Y4Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A simple plaza located towards the west (on the map) of the Plaza de España right across from another small children’s playground with this cool looking tree house with 3 slides coming from all sides and a little window at the top with a safety net and a whole other wooden tiny climbing area with stairs and 2 slides as well.

There’s also a few benches surrounding the area as well. It’s not the biggest best playground ever but it’s still nice and well maintained for the area especially after walking around a bit and maybe your kids want to play for a bit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICL08u9cQ&fid=0x0:0xad72a800d76cded7"],"When":"2024-6-22"},{"Name":"Isabel Draves","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVvvrsMr0Yyxm30G7aEhsgPo0qo2BGG4ucR_pT_6Ccwltklz6vnCQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were so happy to find this enormous playground after hunting for a suitable playground all morning!  They have huge circular swings and tire swings for adults or kids; swings for kids up to age ten; and swings for toddlers.  There was a large group of young teens playing on the swings and spinning playground equipment during their recess.  Right nearby there were kids ages 5-11 enjoying the amazing rope bridges, wooden ladders, tall play structure, and tall slides.  This truly is a playground for all ages and a relaxing destination for tourists traveling with kids in Madrid. You can whisper to a friend through an underground tunnel and fill your water bottle.  There is even an ice cream store nearby, a few restaurants, and a Cervantes monument if you want to add an educational component.  Safe and fun.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDh3-P_ew&fid=0x0:0xad72a800d76cded7"],"When":"2023-3-21"},{"Name":"Emily Wood","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWPEHA2GBAX666IOePB4TzTfx2gSRBaRWbF4N0CU_hFly_1_TCG5A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really sweet series of playgrounds in a big plaza/park. Several different stations of different kinds of swings (tire, toddler, big kid, etc) and one central area with a big climbing structure and slides for all ages. A playground so good I thought, "I need to make sure other people know to come here." Hence this review.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCI8aKwkQE&fid=0x0:0xad72a800d76cded7"],"When":"2025-4-2"},{"Name":"Thiago Fernandes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLmuVB6yMO7JXdsRWCuTeIfeXgOfYMQtp5tx5aJaO1gVIclNai1=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This playground is amazing! Instead of my motorcycle in the park, I recommend taking the ferry for beautiful views.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAuOBCK-L4rvrVbOO23pFR5&fid=0x0:0xef26c37465a04be4"],"When":"2025-12-8"},{"Name":"Starasia Starr","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVUZLe4jOwN0Ru10wQR-IFQLN3oB8WwiqbhlJztYdgu7nngR-Cb=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A beautiful park to take a stroll. Very well maintained. There is a huge, free rose garden. You can also walk to the opposite end for amazing views of the city. There is also a nice spot in the middle near the street where you can sit and have drinks. Gorgeous greenery and flowers and plants. A jewel in the city and not very crowded.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCYyc61HA&fid=0x0:0xef26c37465a04be4"],"When":"2025-5-5"},{"Name":"Shonigal Galshoni","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWAksMz7rF5kJ93o1v93Hzu40dLpnVlyMRYbkpnRcRy_2UHma4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The perfect park!
Paradise!
However: the other side of the park is not even worth mentioning. A big miss and mess.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBej8jpZW_vz0k14na_ROX9&fid=0x0:0xef26c37465a04be4"],"When":"2025-10-9"},{"Name":"sampi16 sampi16","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKPGPPXV7zILaB_lgbQlvGy6ZdwEDK8lAp3JTgivfjlBMLcrQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful place and very was very calm when we were there, a lovely time all around.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCbnK9MdqCNMuPt-fl6Un0e&fid=0x0:0xef26c37465a04be4"],"When":"2025-11-29"},{"Name":"John West","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXe-0ZHRah1PfP8S-vXkCX5Qsfyev1LtGf1UPogWu2O14QItQfJyQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing Views of Madrid and Sunset was just Gorgeous!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCq1ac9mXWNTN00FPAdtwHL&fid=0x0:0xef26c37465a04be4"],"When":"2025-11-2"},{"Name":"Pong Lenis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWmFxgCYM6gEAt1jIKoZP8ptzgNZL-9zzzKJy5MkI8Asohd2Jid=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It is a very lovely park, it’s free and doesn’t cost anything, check the local times for when it opens and closes, it has a lovely little pond and a very nice statue in a water fountain, the garden is very well maintained and has lots of lovely flowers. Definitely worth checking out and taking a walk in the park. There are several other monuments close by worth checking out as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID5ga2uOg&fid=0x0:0xef26c37465a04be4"],"When":"2023-10-25"},{"Name":"Ajai Augustine","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX1GnkDsopskmBTnz04JjmQNFN-jIRWwPsifkOzswIQi3N2-52a=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Yet another beautiful park within the city limits of Madrid and a really significant one. One end of the park hosts the Temple of Debod even though I couldn't visit it. It was not closed but I didn't get the time to reach there and get some pics. What makes it distinct is that the park comprises a geographically unsymmetrical terrain with slopes where you can sit and enjoy the beautiful sunset. It houses a variety of monuments and also a Bird Observatory within it. Good place to spend your evenings reading or relaxing away from city life!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICj89fv7QE&fid=0x0:0xef26c37465a04be4"],"When":"2024-4-25"},{"Name":"Elisabetta Borzini","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWW9OaJFHYeOlmWeyc9v25DLabeFhCxN7jRlbMj8RkcjNuLAtMf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is a dream!
It’s close to my house so I tend to come here more often than other parks and it’s an oasis of peace.
It’s very large so you can access it from different parts and walk in all directions. It’s extremely clean and well maintained, the trash cans are always empty and the lawns super lush!
It’s an open park, so I wouldn’t be surprised if people slept there at night, but there’s no sign of it.
Also, because of the open park factor I wouldn’t recommend walking there late at night (but I’m a woman so perhaps hyper aware of safety risks).
Dogs are running around everywhere but generally owners are respectful and clean up after them as well as call them back if they see someone uncomfortable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID1zdPLGw&fid=0x0:0xef26c37465a04be4"],"When":"2024-1-9"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Tom Hankin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKwnFNJpRfYsWBqy_LVWmyTAExju50ZZyABorsFVWyWKaeqnA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A really great park since it was reformed a few years ago. It has lovely gardens and children play areas that are suitable for kids of all ages. I regularly go with my 2 year old and she loves going there most of all the parks in the area.

I also go to the park regularly to run on the 1.2km track at night time which is free to everyone and goes around the perimeter of the park, you just have to be careful if you go at busy periods because of kids and dogs that may wander onto the running track.

The park also has a lot of sports facilities that are available such as beach volleyball, football pitches, padel, basketball courts and even for field hockey.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Felippe Leite","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUc3SslhnNTvMFNet4sYIoDm1kfX4igOB58VxIsIV9WeRrkXyugBg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a great family park inside the Chamberi neighbourhood! Cuenta con zonas ajardinadas, caminos peatonales y espacios abiertos ideales para pasear, descansar o hacer deporte ligero. Suele estar tranquilo entre semana y tiene buena iluminación por la noche. La mezcla de vegetación y arquitectura contemporánea crea un ambiente agradable, con vistas directas al skyline del norte de Madrid. Es uno de los espacios verdes más recientes de la zona y forma parte del proyecto de renovación del entorno de CTBA, pensado para añadir áreas de ocio y descanso en medio del distrito financiero.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Mario García","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVkBUANmFqRWNQhQln-LnZi9yg8iQq-NHtnGUa0qbKckcaPgmxw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Era un gran parque hasta que han dejado de arreglar los bancos (3 rotos) y los perros campan a sus anchas, haciendo sus necesidades en cualquier sitio y asustando a niños pequeños. Además lo cierran aleatoriamente por la excusa de "climatología adversa"","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carpe Diem","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVc4Ua60D5DCmgSsGvwZXuPU396NcZ51fQQPoabvAh2aE6P7Xnh=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Pese a que los perros están prohibidos campan a sus anchas por todo el parque, pero lo más preocupante, es que hacen sus necesidades en zonas donde hay bebés, que se meten las manos en la boca y pueden pillar cualquier infección.

Lo más gracioso es que, pese a la prohibición no hay nadie que les diga que no pueden pasar.

Los perros se meten en el arenero de los niños y los dueños, no parecen tener dos dedos de frente. Donde hay bebés no deben hacer pis y caca los perros.

Los perros deben tener espacios solo para ellos, para que sean libres de hacer sus necesidades, y jugar. No podemos estar pendientes de que haya pis o caca de perro donde juegan nuestros hijos. Sentido común!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"María Luisa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIUUdjR8ZKUZfWAWA-08b6xosuk8iD-QdjA_j13_wRQerPpfRw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Estará muy bien cuando esté totalmente abierto al público pues lo que ahora llaman parque nuevo del Canal es un estrecho corredor lateral. Aún así, merece la pena visitarlo por su jardín vertical que le da interés al espacio y también por el que dicen que es el único ejemplar de jacaranda que hay plantado en Madrid en un entorno público.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDx6baheg&fid=0x0:0x627d5d1aa76c229a"],"When":"2023-6-11"},{"Name":"Lavidal Vidal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVnF9iAVZZPR88Mpf-bK3q7_RMOvx7-bdtL-kQFL0msdQ804N6u5Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Este parque me encanta, pero le veo un gran problema y es que lleva meses sin luz por la tarde, se han fundido las bombillas y no las arreglan y otro pero enorme que le veo es que en invierno cierra a las 19.00hs y abre a las 10.00hs.
He visto que hay quien se queja de las heces de los perros cosa que yo no he observado si he visto a mamas y papas meter a sus niños entre matorrales para que hagan "sus cosas" y también he visto la guarrería que dejan los papas o los nenes en la zona infantil (envoltorios de bollos, cleenex, servilletas etc) o de la tierra que echan los nenes jugando en las fuentes.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"E A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ_vA-_O68sbAD9GPcShcNgxM40aVMfY8X0PqJC8wYxwGrKjg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"El parque está muy bien, pero se ven perros sueltos (cuando en las normas indica que tienen que ir atados) e incluso dentro de zonas en las que pone expresamente que está prohibido. Los guardias de seguridad no dicen nada...","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"federico rufrancos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXuRYnPQToq9DbVDTJdug5WaqilL5Cly3cf1H1St8JXNoA6H0UBmQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hermoso parque. Con un camino para recorrerlo de punta a punta","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dave Brown","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXLJjQrkTVty80twgkn6xfxnmp9uOj5Fl8Y9gK22b4eNljlu1SP=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Mas que parque es un jardín y no muy grande. Este jardín destaca por su extensión y diversidad de instalaciones, perfectas para familias y visitantes de todas las edades. Las zonas verdes están bien mantenidas y ofrecen amplios espacios para actividades recreativas, deporte y descanso. Su ubicación estratégica lo hace muy accesible y es un punto de encuentro importante para la comunidad local. Un espacio que combina funcionalidad, historia y naturaleza de manera excepcional. Definitivamente un lugar que vale la pena visitar.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carmen Gámez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKXOUk3T6UtULJUkEeWlQcQkOfUgxbUCNKV39sP-T1qRT6p9Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Me hice un tratamiento facial completo con Daniela y me encantó. En el parque infantil se debería pensar en retirar la tierra. Ensucia el parque, pues los niños la echan fuera, resbalan y se caen.
Estyo hace que parezca muy sucio.
A ésto se añade el problema de los perros. Los dueños no recogen sus cacas y los perros campan a sus anchas por los parterres.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Héctor Garcia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKMuGIfA0gBy93la64V8UgeSzEnzQmsbpmTfPTpBpOp1P5VWg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"El parque no está mal, acaban de ampliar la zona infantil, pero aún así no es muy grande. No han puesto nuevos e  la última remodelación con lo que esto no cambiará en el futuro. Ayer,  hasta las 19 horas no empezó a dar una sombra medio decente.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"MRColubi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVIIk_WZjSTO7pKK-2XIklmGrDz98yiFXVLYzsZ7mZ0qHdKWew=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Han realizado una reforma y lo han dejado peor de lo que estaba. Но! Я думаю что это территория торгового цена,одного из самых дорогих, и они могли бы помыть детскую площадку и убрать мусор. Выглядит это очень плохо. Много мусора, много пятен на площадке. Я видела как дети тут играют босяком, в таких грязных условиях. Кстати это самая «дорогая» улица Мадрида с самыми дорогими магазинами страны.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAwWxV2Mmb1ab72Mp4z26vO&fid=0x0:0x8d0cd17c8baf3870"],"When":"2025-7-13"},{"Name":"Joaquín Fernández de Solís","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJSFKzuS64-aFgz6qgsgGOYHZxdWxfcJoc_l1atyu9uFJUDEg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Es un parque cómodo pero muy sucio y abandonado por el Ayuntamiento. Además, a causa de la gran cantidad de repartidores que esperan en la puerta del Five Guys de al lado, está lleno de basura y a partir del atardecer las ratas campan por sus respetos.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBhrUuAG8zbhpYEZguP97gx&fid=0x0:0x8d0cd17c8baf3870"],"When":"2025-9-8"},{"Name":"Begoña Hernández","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKiUdXGR4TP85e7MC5mmgTYHicmAg3G419iyjgOs-xUB5n1gA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"En realidad no es un parque infantil. Es el Belén y el Tiovivo que monta todos los años el Corte Inglés en su centro de Serrano.
También hay una casa que supongo que será la casa de Santa Claus. No llegué a entrar.
El Tiovivo es bonito. De los antiguos.
No estaba terminado por lo que mi valoración no puede ser muy exacta.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICl_5uwjAE&fid=0x0:0x8d0cd17c8baf3870"],"When":"2023-11-29"},{"Name":"Emilio Parmegiani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVloCRxSMgtFhMxBDT6xvX3RcNhh14w2S9hjgAN09ZIcyYDvfue=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Parque infantil localizado en el área externa del corte inglés de la calle serrano. Área con muchos juguetes para niños de 0 a 6 años. #playground #niños #parque","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC2zMmnRQ&fid=0x0:0x8d0cd17c8baf3870"],"When":"2022-4-14"},{"Name":"Pablo Guinea","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXtHc8gSGv0s0XY-2hXXs3OIOnLFKi0QTHzmmshbyPKb1gVDQpipA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"El parque está bastante mejor que la mayoría de los parques infantiles de Madrid, que en general son patéticos.

Además, está muy bien que tenga una cubierta ya que, en días muy soleados, los niños pueden seguir jugando sin abrasarse al tocar las instalaciones.

De todas formas, no pongo 5 estrellas porque el parque ya está en muy malas condiciones por el paso del tiempo. Las cuerdas de algunos de los módulos estaban inicialmente cubiertas de plástico. El paso del tiempo ha hecho que estén absolutamente rotas.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Observador silencioso","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUV5Kfr24BoKS-SWahVwZTWbNq24LwgMfFgRcZ6TzK7kVv-Y0Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Es uno de los pocos parques infantiles de Madrid con techo, lastima que sea tan pequeño. Tiene un tobogán pequeño y algunos juegos más pero le faltan los columpios. El techo da sombra pero no protege de la lluvia. Suele haber espectáculo de títeres por las tardes los viernes y sábado a partir de las 6.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Cuenta con una colonia de viviendas con todos los servicios (colegio, iglesia, cine...) para atender a sus trabajadores. Un pueblo en el centro de Madrid.

Decidimos acercarnos desde Toledo, y gran decepcion, está cerrado. Ha salido un guardia de seguridad con la única explicación de que han decidido hacer puente. Que nos parece fenomenal, pero corregid la web o avisad o algo.

Atentamente
José Antonio Portas","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDSl-_lmQE&fid=0x0:0x6505d19dd30b3038"],"When":"2021-1-12"},{"Name":"luis mingo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVUpA1R7iXEqp0ZVtkPEZgCvEYTuAIaG-Sx8s8RDx4gw24_fH5v=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Este parque móvil tiene su entrada principal por Cea Bermudez.

Económicamente, es una vergüenza que con los problemas financieros que sufre la sociedad española haya tanto coche oficial del Estado para el uso de ministros, asesores y demás compinches. Históricamente es una muestra de una de las peculiares en la gestión de Francisco Franco después de ganar la guerra (este edificio está unido al poblado San Cristóbal)","Images":null,"When":""}]

Hay arena de sobra para que los pequeños puedan jugar; también cuenta con seguridad de sobra para que no se aproximen a la carretera. Lo único es que en verano incide mucho el sol y apenas hay sombra.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAxKtcN7RHRjxvlRe3ydxWd&fid=0x0:0xd72f53dc8076d16f"],"When":"2025-7-14"},{"Name":"Miguel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWrTIbeSRTZp5Sa-saexhGZIAagis3FYMCk6ppqxr3YPAwdHIUT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Área de juegos Infantiles, son como una simulación de forma de montaña, son tres.
Otra forma de crear para los peques distintas maneras de jugar y divertirse.
Los pequeños montículos están protegidos con caucho y goma para que los peques no se hagan daño y evitar posibles accidentes, el resto del suelo es de arena.
Esta en una zona bien ubicado sin tránsito de vehículos, zona toda peatonal y hay otros dos parques más al lado.
Cuenta además con una fuente de agua potable justo en el área de juegos Infantil.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDb3b7FrQE&fid=0x0:0xd72f53dc8076d16f"],"When":"2024-8-8"},{"Name":"Raquel G.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU6BroWJLq9O6evPqcEwwWK3qJlflXEN_qFoKJtMNKKMpECPzd26A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""}]
