title: Parque Infantil Paseo del Prado
address: Centro, 28014 Madrid
open_hours: {"Friday":["Open 24 hours"],"Monday":["Open 24 hours"],"Saturday":["Open 24 hours"],"Sunday":["Open 24 hours"],"Thursday":["Open 24 hours"],"Tuesday":["Open 24 hours"],"Wednesday":["Open 24 hours"]}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Abel Abad","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWpXv04kEgrbKhIMn3iQoZ8y13oP1L1ZxDlTpr-BuynblGmLWg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We recently visited the playground located in Paseo del Prado, Madrid, and while the experience was pleasant overall, there are definitely a few things worth noting for future visitors. The location is truly fantastic—nestled in the heart of Madrid with easy access to some of the city’s most iconic landmarks, museums, and beautiful tree-lined boulevards. The views from the area are stunning, giving both locals and tourists a perfect backdrop for a relaxing afternoon.

The playground itself is clean and well-maintained, offering a safe space for children to enjoy. However, it lacks variety in terms of play structures. There are only a few basic features available, which means that older kids might lose interest quickly. It could definitely benefit from more interactive elements, climbing features, or creative play options to make it more engaging for a wider age range.

Additionally, the absence of restrooms and potable water is a drawback, especially for families spending extended time in the area. It’s advisable to come prepared with bottled water and to know the location of nearby facilities.

Despite these limitations, the playground remains a great place to stop by for a short break while exploring the Paseo del Prado. With a few improvements, it could easily become a top family spot in Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDoh_2PYA&fid=0x0:0x44b91fb2b26ab43f"],"When":"2025-4-29"},{"Name":"Xoom Too","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVLRzhuxFKh1jOBQiJLb1bjferwZ-xPRZ7v7ReqgRp2P_uVyh9Y4Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A simple park located in the Prado Boulevard that’s quite widely spreadout but doesn’t actually have a lot of stuff as they only have 2 pairs of swings in the middle, a climbing and jumping thing to the right and to the left is a slide.

But it’s a great place for running around or just walking around the Prado Boulevard too. It’s also nice as the whole area around it has benches that are like part of the seperator from the cars.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDHpYirNA&fid=0x0:0x44b91fb2b26ab43f"],"When":"2024-9-18"},{"Name":"Kelley Soper","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXRgh8lJ66v8kqdqLBHhQ7xNH1crtK5Ibys8wnJPmLUy7o05MDC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Nice place to stop and take a break. Este lugar carga con un profundo valor histórico, siendo testigo de uno de los episodios más cruciales del conflicto. Ubicado en el Parque del Oeste, específicamente en el lugar donde estaba el antiguo cuartel, el monumento se integra en un entorno natural que invita a la reflexión. Las vistas desde este punto son realmente impresionantes, ofreciendo una panorama única de Madrid y sus alrededores. La escultura transmite un mensaje de recuerdo y paz, siendo un espacio de memoria histórica importante para comprender nuestro pasado. Es un lugar perfecto para quienes buscan conocer la historia reciente de España y rendir tributo a aquellos que participaron en estos acontecimientos. Una visita esencial para reflexionar sobre la paz y la convivencia. Un espacio que combina historia, naturaleza y memoria.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Vivo Vázquez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLvUyRyXlZBRb-TT4BhrnwZ8T78FNkcDjPnfNdsrNdFZg9teg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Una hermosa escultura dedicada a Francisco de Quevedo, uno de los más grandes escritores del Siglo de Oro español. Este monumento rinde merecido homenaje al genial poeta, novelista y político que marcó la literatura española con su ingenio y maestría verbal. Ubicado en la Glorieta de Quevedo que lleva su nombre, la estatua se encuentra en el corazón de Chamberí, uno de los barrios más emblemáticos de Madrid. La obra capta perfectamente el espíritu intelectual y la personalidad del escritor, siendo un punto de referencia tanto cultural como geográfico en la ciudad. El entorno de la glorieta, con su tránsito constante, refleja la vitalidad literaria que Quevedo representó. Es un lugar ideal para los amantes de la literatura clásica española y para quienes desean rendir tributo a este gigante de las letras hispanas. Una parada obligatoria para comprender el legado cultural de Madrid y de España.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"carloscharmy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWFdw1qpWaL-mYY5fLQw6J2ARy5ZrhgxYlqAtu7vjf2_TufjVo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Esta estatua, creada por el escultor Agustín Querol y erigida en 1902, rinde homenaje al escritor madrileño Francisco de Quevedo. Originalmente ubicada en la plaza de Santa Bárbara, fue trasladada en 1963 a su ubicación actual en la glorieta de Quevedo. El monumento se destaca por su pedestal ornamentado, aunque algunos elementos previstos no se llegaron a instalar. Rodeada de una fuente monumental, la estatua forma parte de la historia escultórica de Madrid, junto a otras obras de Querol en la ciudad. Ideal para una visita cultural en la zona.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDHlp7cjAE&fid=0x0:0x75995848fd71a015"],"When":"2024-9-15"},{"Name":"Doncelador","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXnewNEbYYaXdHD0epgVByIWzW2jKqBZMPTzU18-HYzM_sBuOGCqw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Es obra del escultor Agustín Querol Subirats en 1902. La escultura es de cuerpo entero, representa a Quevedo vestido como caballero de la época con la cruz de Santiago en el pecho, espada y capa corta, con sus típicos anteojos, bigote y perilla. En su mano derecha porta una pluma y en la izquierda guarda en el cinto un billete.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICktc-bDQ&fid=0x0:0x75995848fd71a015"],"When":"2018-12-24"},{"Name":"Linoferho Fernandez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWhv0CAHZzDdPwjajSGRWcssSivfzgk_BZledfaZDmfOAopMdHv=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Monumento erigido en honor del escritor Francisco de Quevedo, uno de los genios literatos que colaboraron en dar brillo a las letras españolas del S. XVII.

La escultura es obra del escultor Agustín Querol, muy popular en el Madrid de la época, y fue inaugurada en 1902, con la presencia del Rey Alfonso XIII y del entonces alcalde de Madrid Alberto Aguilera, fué colocada en la que hoy es la plaza de Alonso Martinez, y trasladada, en los años 60, a su ubicación actual.

La figura es de mármol de Carrara, el pedestal de caliza tiene unas figuras alegóricas a la actividad literaria.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDm34mFjQE&fid=0x0:0x75995848fd71a015"],"When":"2022-2-13"},{"Name":"José Julio Melgares","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVPlI3_WxZ-JbiFDSG6A1n_aKR_BFRpvuYb0hLgejNuccGQun5Z=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"El monumento de Francisco Gómez de Quevedo Villegas y Santibáñez Cevallos (Madrid, 1580 - Villanueva de los Infantes, Ciudad Real, 1645), ilustre escritor del siglo de Oro, preside esta glorieta desde 1963, antes estaba situado en la Plaza de Alonso Martínez. Realizado en 1902 por el escultor catalán Agustín Querol Subirats (Tortosa, 1860 - Madrid, 1909).","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICE8-PGuQE&fid=0x0:0x75995848fd71a015"],"When":"2017-8-24"},{"Name":"daniele pedroni","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXnkaPKb1GmjVC8z_wjLbuqZ_-jhO2XAXa2yuEZIiK57ABxvoYO=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Quevedo o il Monumento a Quevedo è un esempio di arte pubblica a Madrid , Spagna. Un'opera di Agustín Querol , è dedicata a Francisco de Quevedo , illustre scrittore dell'era barocca .
Opera di Agustín Querol , fu inaugurata nella sua ubicazione originale in Plaza de Alonso Martínez  il 5 giugno 1902 (la cerimonia era stata più volte ritardata dal maltempo) come parte di una serie di inaugurazioni di sculture all'aperto a Madrid in occasione delle celebrazioni per il raggiungimento della maggiore età del re Alfonso XIII ,  alle quali parteciparono diverse personalità di spicco come, oltre a Quevedo, Agustín Argüelles , Lope de Vega , Juan Bravo Murillo , Eloy Gonzalo .
La statua in marmo di Carrara in piedi che rappresenta Quevedo è posta sulla sommità del monumento. Indossa il suo Pince-nez (chiamato quevedos in spagnolo dal suo nome) e la croce di San Giacomo sul petto. Quattro sculture allegoriche che rappresentano Satira , Poesia , Prosa e Storia abbracciano il basamento in pietra calcarea .
Il calcare di Novelda del piedistallo si è eroso negli anni '60 e il piedistallo è stato sostituito da una replica di pietra (meno porosa) di Atarce scolpita da Fernando Cruz Solís . Il monumento è stato spostato nella sua posizione attuale nella Glorieta de Quevedo  negli anni '60.
Nel 1999, sulla base del monumento è stata installata una fontana in granito di Badajoz.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Xoom Too","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVLRzhuxFKh1jOBQiJLb1bjferwZ-xPRZ7v7ReqgRp2P_uVyh9Y4Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The monument was created on June 5, 1902 and created by Agustín Querol, and Fernando Cruz Solís. The monument is also located in a roundabout area on the Fuencarral street and near the Quevedo metro station.

The monument is dedicated to Francisco del Quevedo who was a Spanish politican and writer known for being one of the most important writers of the Spanish baroque and known for books such as La cuna y la sepultura, Historia de la vida del Buscón, Los Sueños, and more.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICL1dz0iwE&fid=0x0:0x75995848fd71a015"],"When":"2024-6-21"},{"Name":"Javier Gonzalez-Soria","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-bs7DdPBvaX0K1wRpct26TnEXl3DQYsxz29GO9vFz9f3Expitag=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"El monumento a Francisco de Quevedo fue erigido a petición del alcalde Alberto Aguilera, por el escultor Agustín Querol e inaugurado, aún sin terminar, el 5 de enero de 1902, en la plaza de Santa Bárbara, actual Alonso Martínez y con la presencia del rey, de Alberto Aguilera y las principales autoridades y personajes de Madrid.

La glorieta de Quevedo ha sido una de tantas plazas madrileñas por las que fueron desfilando larga serie de monumentos, un tanto errabundos, que han tardado años en hallar su ubicación definitiva. Así, en 1902, el mismo año que se inaugura el monumento en la plaza de Santa Bárbara, se inaugura e instala en esta glorieta de Quevedo, la estatua de Lope de Vega, y años después, fue sustituida por los Héroes del Dos de mayo, de Aniceto Marinas. Más tarde, se instaló en este lugar, el monumento a Quevedo y en el que sigue actualmente.","Images":null,"When":""}]

En el centro de la glorieta hay una estatua de gran tamaño en homenaje al gran escritor que le da nombre, obra de Agustín Querol. La zona está llena de restaurantes y comercios de todo tipo. Además, la glorieta está decorada con cuatro árboles con leds azules por navidad.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICB5Im7Iw&fid=0x0:0x7e2ec2610bfa189d"],"When":"2022-12-17"},{"Name":"Salvator Mundi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWl3Y3brUOzzqe3dORyucP80GI88NIqEWYGdpx9_dHNvvi0kc5K=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Die Glorieta de Quevedo, dieser kleine Kreisverkehr im Herzen von Madrid, ist ein Ort, der gleichermaßen Geschichte, Alltagshektik und eine Prise Chaos in sich vereint.
Als ich mich ihr nähere, wird schnell klar, dass sie nicht mit majestätischen Statuen oder opulenten Brunnen prahlt.
Nein, die Glorieta de Quevedo ist eine echte Diva: unaufgeregt, ein wenig exzentrisch, und immer mitten im Geschehen.

In ihrer Mitte steht eine Statue von Francisco de Quevedo, dem berühmten Dichter und Satiriker des spanischen Siglo de Oro. Und wie könnte es anders sein – Quevedo, bekannt für seine scharfe Zunge und seinen beißenden Humor, steht da mit einem Blick, der zu sagen scheint: „So viele Autos, und keiner hat Zeit für ein gutes Sonett?“ Er hält eine Feder in der einen und ein Buch in der anderen Hand, als wolle er jedem vorbeieilenden Pendler einen Vers nachwerfen.
Doch die meisten beachten ihn kaum, zu sehr beschäftigt mit ihrem Tag – oder dem Versuch, diesen vertrackten Verkehrsknotenpunkt heil zu überstehen.

Die Glorieta selbst ist ein Wirbel aus städtischem Leben. Autos kreisen um sie herum wie auf einem Karussell, Motorräder schlängeln sich geschickt durch die engen Lücken, und Fußgänger kämpfen tapfer, um die Straße zu überqueren.
Die Ampeln hier haben offenbar ihren eigenen Zeitplan, der selten mit dem der Fußgänger übereinstimmt.
Es fühlt sich ein bisschen an wie ein Tanz, nur dass niemand den Takt kennt.

Rund um die Glorieta reihen sich Bars, Cafés und Geschäfte aneinander, die ihre ganz eigene Geschichte erzählen. Eine charmante Mischung aus hippen Lokalen und traditionellen Läden prägt das Viertel.
Es gibt eine Bäckerei, die so duftet, dass man fast vergisst, warum man hier überhaupt hergekommen ist, und ein paar kleine Buchläden, die vermutlich mehr Geschichten über Quevedo verkaufen, als er je selbst geschrieben hat.

Doch zurück zu unserem Dichter in der Mitte: Quevedo hat diesen Platz nicht immer für sich gehabt.
Die Glorieta wurde im 19. Jahrhundert angelegt, und wie so viele Orte in Madrid hat sie sich im Laufe der Zeit verändert.
Früher war sie ruhiger, weniger verkehrsreich – ein Ort, an dem sich Spaziergänger in Ruhe ihre Gedanken sammeln konnten.
Heute dagegen scheint es, als ob Quevedo selbst kaum mit dem Kopf aus seinen Papieren hochkommen würde, um das Durcheinander um ihn herum zu registrieren.

Trotzdem hat die Glorieta de Quevedo einen unbestreitbaren Charme. Sie ist lebendig, eigenwillig und ein bisschen chaotisch – genau wie die Stadt, in der sie sich befindet.
Während ich dort stehe und das bunte Treiben beobachte, stelle ich mir vor, wie Quevedo seine spitze Feder in die Hand nimmt und über diesen Ort schreiben würde. Wahrscheinlich wäre es eine bissige Satire über die Absurditäten des modernen Lebens.
Oder vielleicht würde er einfach schmunzeln, einen Schluck Wein aus einer nahen Taverne nehmen und denken: „Madrid bleibt Madrid – immer ein wenig verrückt, aber dafür umso liebenswerter.“

Stand: 17.11.2024

"Das Leben bewegt sich sehr, sehr schnell. Wenn man nicht gelegentlich anhält und sich umschaut, könnte man es verpassen"","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Juan Zuñiga","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWn3T98VZZ4vRWHU9ba8rgrEqZIU15U3Ri5euEnnSngdJ1ecbI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Chamberí es un distrito de Madrid formado por seis barrios: Almagro, Trafalgar, Arapiles, Gaztambide, Ríos Rosas y Vallehermoso. Su desarrollo urbanístico es fruto del Plan de Ensanche de Carlos María de Castro aprobado en 1860 cuando desapareció la Real Cerca de Felipe IV y ejecutado en las décadas siguientes hasta la consolidación de los años treinta del siglo pasado y las reconstrucciones tras la Guerra Civil. Aquí se encuentran los palacios y palacetes mas bellos de la ciudad –los supervivientes a la piqueta de los años 50, 60 y 70– y aquí vivieron personalidades como Benito Pérez Galdós, José Ortega y Gasset, Gregorio Marañón, Rubén Darío, Antonio Machado, Pablo Neruda, Gerardo Diego, Ramón Pérez de Ayala, Agustín Querol, Joaquín Sorolla, Mariano Benlliure y Miguel de Unamuno. Hoy pasearemos entre las esculturas públicas que se exhiben en este distrito.

La más importante es, quizás, la dedicada a Francisco de Quevedo en la glorieta con su nombre, obra de Agustín Querol (1860-1909), uno de los encargos promovidos por el alcalde Alberto Aguilera en 1902 como parte del programa escultórico conmemorativo de la mayoría de edad de Alfonso XIII. La escultura es bellísima pero el flujo de tráfico rodado apenas permite apreciarla. Tal vez habría que sustituirla por una réplica y llevar a un museo la original.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICbvt_MmQE&fid=0x0:0x7e2ec2610bfa189d"],"When":"2024-7-27"}]

The monument features a stone base with figures on all four sides. On the main side, facing southwards, is the bronze figure of Emilio Castelar, and at his feet lies a marble Venus, an allegory to the truth. Flanking him on either side are two classical public speakers, Cicero and Demosthenes who observe and listening to Castelar.

On the main side, facing southwards, we can find the bronze figure of Emilio Castelar, and at his feet lies a marble Venus, an allegory to the truth, towards which the bronze figures of a worker, a soldier and a student rise, representing Work, Effort and Study. On the opposite side, there are two classical public speakers: Cicero and Demosthenes who observe and listen to Castelar. It’s a great monument for Dr Rizal.  Commemorating the diplomatic relations between the Spanish Kingdom and the Republic of the Philippines.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCg0pHJlQE&fid=0x0:0xc5da4a1a6d075063"],"When":"2025-2-15"},{"Name":"Bon Salinas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjViqqrKvJioc0TQjAxptdC16_YoIS5bL7tUuTDNTs7DuGFRKzhUIg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"**A Monument of Reconciliation: Spain Honors José Rizal in Madrid**

In a powerful gesture of reconciliation and historical reflection, the Spanish government has unveiled a monument dedicated to José Protasio Rizal, the Philippines' national hero, in the heart of Madrid. This act of recognition comes over a century after Rizal's execution by Spanish colonial authorities in 1896, a moment that marked a turning point in the Philippines' struggle for independence.

The monument, a striking bronze sculpture of Rizal, stands tall in a prominent Madrid plaza, symbolizing a bridge between two nations with a shared, albeit complex, history. Rizal, a polymath, writer, and revolutionary, advocated for reform and peaceful resistance against colonial oppression. His writings, particularly *Noli Me Tangere* and *El Filibusterismo*, exposed the injustices of Spanish rule and inspired a movement for freedom.

The Spanish government's decision to honor Rizal reflects a commitment to acknowledging the past while fostering a spirit of mutual respect and understanding. Spanish officials emphasized that the monument is not just a tribute to Rizal's legacy but also a recognition of the enduring ties between Spain and the Philippines. "This monument is a symbol of our shared history and a step toward healing," said a spokesperson during the unveiling ceremony.

For Filipinos, the monument is a poignant reminder of Rizal's enduring influence and a testament to the power of forgiveness and progress. It also serves as a reminder that history, though often painful, can be a foundation for building stronger, more respectful relationships.

As the sun sets over Madrid, the monument to José Rizal stands as a beacon of hope, reminding us that even the most divided histories can find common ground in the pursuit of truth and reconciliation.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDAlNj81QE&fid=0x0:0xc5da4a1a6d075063"],"When":"2025-2-9"},{"Name":"Chelsea Janes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVi5RYgdJVjosZ1bfo8yRHkVR5BmsCP-H6gForcoflp1a0oA-8B=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very interesting to see Rizal in Spain, especially since it was the Spanish colonists who murdered him. Obviously, though, there is no mention of that anywhere on the monument... ugh. Still, glad this Filipino hero is finally being recognized by the Spanish, even if it was nearly 100 years after they assassinated him...","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICfp_jazwE&fid=0x0:0xc5da4a1a6d075063"],"When":"2025-1-2"},{"Name":"Mocmoc P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUzTfPVUkeKNOWiuxPr3HITdaAOuQcK7LhUSFGEwliKKM8XWGfG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It was a sunny Sunday afternoon in September 2023 when I finally visited the Jose Rizal Monument in Madrid. I had been wanting to see it for a long time, as I am a Filipino and Jose Rizal is our national hero. I highly admire him for his courage, his intellect, and his commitment to fighting for freedom and justice.

The monument is located in the Parque de Santander, a small park in the Chamberí district of Madrid. It is a replica of the Rizal Monument in Manila.

I left the monument feeling inspired and uplifted. I knew that I would never forget my visit to this place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICZzrTSZQ&fid=0x0:0xc5da4a1a6d075063"],"When":"2023-9-10"},{"Name":"Tristan Dwyte","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWNU-MmGLiN_irpQ8N6sJKS4R7F3MdDG2ibBmdnaiG0IEIZzdY0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This is a must-see for every Filipino who visits Madrid. This monument is an equestrian statue and depicts Marquess del Duero on horseback (obviously). That's about all I can say about it since the statue sits in the middle of a busy roundabout and I just didn't feel like getting run over for a better view, especially for someone who is likely unknown outside of Spain. El caballo y el realismo de la figura destacan por su detalle, y la base muestra sus victorias más importantes. Ideal para amantes de la historia y la fotografía.

Dato curioso: Fue inaugurado en 1885 y es obra del escultor Andrés Aleu.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBI68t15q0eIylhq3jDXBhR&fid=0x0:0x34b59cbdb431c889"],"When":"2025-9-1"},{"Name":"Vivo Vázquez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLvUyRyXlZBRb-TT4BhrnwZ8T78FNkcDjPnfNdsrNdFZg9teg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un monumento ecuestre majestuoso dedicado a Manuel Gutiérrez de la Concha, Marqués del Duero, distinguido militar español del siglo XIX. La escultura representa con gran detalle y elegancia al general montado a caballo, transmitiendo la dignidad y el carácter de este importante personaje histórico. Ubicado en el Paseo de la Castellana, el monumento se integra perfectamente en uno de los ejes principales de Madrid, siendo un testimonio pétreo de la historia militar española. La calidad de la obra escultórica es notable, con una excelente ejecución de los detalles tanto del jinete como del caballo. Es un lugar ideal para los amantes de la historia y la fotografía, ofreciendo una oportunidad para conocer más sobre las figuras que marcaron el devenir de España. Un monumento que merece reconocimiento y visita dentro del patrimonio madrileño.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Luis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJx8P9QtFBqT70yfr20sndE3yc6uVKBLBLsJKBg7XJPrGKrGQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Estatua ecuestre clásica dedicada al general  Manuel Gutiérrez de la Concha e Irigoyen, general destacado en la lucha contra el carlismo.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAeuNL39kHoukZCkfD4aXxO&fid=0x0:0x34b59cbdb431c889"],"When":"2025-11-22"},{"Name":"Doncelador","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXnewNEbYYaXdHD0epgVByIWzW2jKqBZMPTzU18-HYzM_sBuOGCqw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Obra del escultor Andrés Aleu en 1885, fué sufragada por suscripción nacional con un coste de 143.000 pesetas, la estatua se fundió en Sevilla con el bronce procedente de cañones donados por el cuerpo de artillería. El Marqués está vestido con traje de campaña y espada tirando de las tiendas con la mano izquierda y levantando la derecha indicando un objetivo.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICktbeUNQ&fid=0x0:0x34b59cbdb431c889"],"When":"2018-11-21"},{"Name":"Victoria Senaty","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXDqI6YcQt-mtmIGFFLGaGy-ebJ3tEwmyjjrN0PDXKEpEamT1h0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"En homenaje a este ilustre, que fue también político 5 veces presidente del senado; como luchador en las guerras carlistas, y por lo tanto isabelino. Haciendo esta defensa llegó a ser capitán general.
La Reina Isabel II le otorgó este título de marquesado. Era también buen empresario, tuvo muchos cultivos de caña de azúcar en Málaga, San Pedro Alcantara.
Por esta época no solo el don de la palabra valía, que hizo buen uso de ello, sino que hacia falta destreza en el campo de batalla, hablamos de finales del 1800, que había que lidiar con cercana Portugal, para conquistar terrenos. En el monumento ecuestre señala con el brazo a la Castellana?","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICKgM3cuAE&fid=0x0:0x34b59cbdb431c889"],"When":"2021-3-24"},{"Name":"Domingo González Gálvez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKO2KxJdpJVDbrQSvbdw4QaNKZSuSbFt8HzF9XA7rpbrUBWGHw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Bonita escultura en el paseo de la castellana
Foto y reseña en agosto del 2025","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBUEkwk7du3fd4bOM8IIi5m&fid=0x0:0x34b59cbdb431c889"],"When":"2025-8-6"}]

title: Monumento dedicado a los Saineteros de Madrid
address: Chamberí, 28010 Madrid
open_hours: {"Friday":["Open 24 hours"],"Monday":["Open 24 hours"],"Saturday":["Open 24 hours"],"Sunday":["Open 24 hours"],"Thursday":["Open 24 hours"],"Tuesday":["Open 24 hours"],"Wednesday":["Open 24 hours"]}
owner: {"id":"","name":"Monumento dedicado a los Saineteros de Madrid (Owner)","link":""}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Miguel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWrTIbeSRTZp5Sa-saexhGZIAagis3FYMCk6ppqxr3YPAwdHIUT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Monumento dedicado a los Saineteros Madrileños.
Se encargó el conjunto escultórico, originalmente llamado Monumento a los Chisperos al escultor Lorenzo Coullaut Valera en 1910.
Tras petición y reivindicación del periodista Mariano de Cavia, por el reciente fallecimiento de Ricardo de la Vega, porqué se les diera el reconocimiento a los escritores de Sainetes.
Según en su placa, corona el monumento un grupo formado por chispero, manola y una pareja típica del Madrid castizo del siglo XIX, debajo del cual están los bustos de Ramón de la Cruz, Chueca, Ricardo de la Vega y Barbieri, en los bajorrelieves del monumento se escenifican obras del género.
El monumento fue inaugurado originalmente en la glorieta de San Vicente el 23 de junio de 1913, con la asistencia de la infanta Isabel, en representación del rey Alfonso XIII, y el Alcalde de Madrid, Eduardo Vincenti, entre otras personalidades. Dos años después fue trasladado al Parque de la Dehesa de Arganzuela donde permaneció olvidado, hasta su traslado a su actual ubicación, en 1933, a la Plaza de los Chisperos en el distrito de Chamberí.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDbqfKupgE&fid=0x0:0x601d57df31339b00"],"When":"2024-8-6"}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"macedonboy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7obIFVFelZpGZFWErr47Wzzrz8xLtHVDOYNGdpIt459EbUg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"This monument stands in tribute to General Jose de San Martin who led the secession of Argentina, Chile, and Peru from the Spanish Empire.\n\nThe monument is an equestrian statue of Jose de San Martin. While not atypical, the statue is slightly unusual for having the general sitting on a prancing horse. The monument is a bit out of the way and not that close to the tourist circuit in Madrid. I wouldn't recommended going out of the way to see it unless already planning to visit the Parque del Oeste.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICM2oHf0wE\u0026fid=0x0:0x5dc97e96e814d6ca"],"When":"2019-8-12"},{"Name":"Angie Amboni","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWNCvvOhPikXDHhGSqxeHBil2Xgekh13uvEvt_b3pneofjTvQXdfw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a beautiful  place","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Vivo Vázquez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLvUyRyXlZBRb-TT4BhrnwZ8T78FNkcDjPnfNdsrNdFZg9teg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un monumento imponente que honra al General José de San Martín, el gran libertador de Argentina, Chile y Perú. La estatua ecuestre captura la figura heroica de este prócer sudamericano que jugó un papel fundamental en la emancipación de América del Sur. Su ubicación en el Parque del Oeste proporciona un marco natural apropiado para reflexionar sobre los lazos históricos y culturales entre España y las naciones hermanas de América Latina. El monumento está muy bien conservado y la figura del general se presenta con dignidad y autoridad. Es un punto de encuentro importante para la comunidad argentina en Madrid y un símbolo de los fuertes vínculos que nos unen. Muy recomendable su visita.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tito Rubio","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUQxmo6mQaJ-jpXRWak2CdDTM5wjRUdpYxV0TDYJj1nb75_p6dZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Finalizado en 1961, se sitúa en el centro de una glorieta oval. La estatua ecuestre se alza sobre un pedestal de granito levantado en lo alto de una plataforma ajardinada con tres escalinatas. Muestra al general vestido con uniforme militar y en postura de saludar con la mano derecha. El óvalo de la glorieta, rodeado de grandes plátanos, enmarca adecuadamente al monumento y crea un remate interesante a los tres paseos y acceso frontal que confluyen en él.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC1yr7Afw\u0026fid=0x0:0x5dc97e96e814d6ca"],"When":"2023-12-27"},{"Name":"Hernán Gutierrez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXChmrOJID08gziXu5fImCUtbdd7d7axyCFKm8AUjfy59_CjAjN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hermosa la estatua del Padre de la Patria Argentina, disfruté mucho la visita. También muy lindo leer reseñas de españoles largando espuma por la boca por tener en su capital semejante monumento, encima de mantenerlo reluciente con sus impuestos. Gracias, saludos desde Mendoza, Argentina! :D","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICZg--kQQ\u0026fid=0x0:0x5dc97e96e814d6ca"],"When":"2023-9-16"},{"Name":"Germán Pulvett","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX8ZcKYThU18A7REiYDsdEtDwbqb0fi0y3qDIyf_-N1y6UGEdl0-A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un muy bonito monumento ecuestre al General San Martín, libertador del sur de Sudamérica. Se encuentra en un bonito estado y con posición en dirección al museo de América.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDjxLuiPA\u0026fid=0x0:0x5dc97e96e814d6ca"],"When":"2024-4-29"},{"Name":"Doncelador","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXnewNEbYYaXdHD0epgVByIWzW2jKqBZMPTzU18-HYzM_sBuOGCqw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Estatua ecuestre en memoria a José de San Martín realizada en bronce por el escultor Louis Joseph Daumas, el pedestal es obra de Herrero Palacios realizado en granito. La estatua es una copia de la que hay en la Plaza de San Martín en Buenos Aires, fué donada por el pueblo Argentino en señal de amistad y se inauguró en 1961.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICkte-QCg\u0026fid=0x0:0x5dc97e96e814d6ca"],"When":"2018-9-18"},{"Name":"A A M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU8Hd981Fz1SAgtytb8fj_DEyHDzf1iTt6nBEy3ijJPdz0rvLF9ng=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Para los madrileños se llama la glorieta o paseo del caballo , se accede desde Moncloa por un paseo al lado del Parque del Oeste desde allí puedes ya adentrarte en el corazón del Parque, especialmente divertido si vas en verano y saltan los aspersores por la noche.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Ferhat Yildiz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWV6W2gfwUqAFIDgffx1HATO6JsIPotrLYKf7X6lAbflWpp-7tw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A charming tribute to one of Spain’s literary greats! The Statue of Jacinto Benavente, located in the peaceful Parque del Retiro in Madrid, is a simple yet elegant monument that beautifully honors the Nobel Prize-winning playwright.

The statue blends seamlessly into the park’s serene atmosphere, making it a lovely spot to pause, reflect, and appreciate Spanish culture.

Whether you’re a fan of literature or just strolling through Retiro, this statue is worth a quick visit for its historical significance and picturesque surroundings.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCom53nWQ&fid=0x0:0xdfb79e16d3b4103c"],"When":"2025-4-20"},{"Name":"Manuel Urquidi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVb3NqeqLMbUnMDHCCGqfKIrXOgRZeGLl7N3nZOPBiM7Lx4le2p=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This statue of the 1922 Nobel Prize in Literature winner, Jacinto Benavente, was funded through a public appeal that raised over one million pesetas. The statue, created by sculptor Victorio Macho, aims to immortalize the soul of the artist, as mentioned by Macho himself. It was inaugurated in April 1962. The area is also home to some oddly shaped trees like yew trees and horse chestnuts.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID_0_SrGQ&fid=0x0:0xdfb79e16d3b4103c"],"When":"2025-1-26"},{"Name":"Jim De Mauro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVYTq70wrnbeJxNH8_FvCSQjFCURTl0uZJE-ekM3hY8Wvk5v9dy=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"One of the most exotic trees we have been able to find was near this statue.  The shapes are exotic and intriguing.  We were not able to determine if they grew this way or they were pruned to look so unreal.  We spent a half an hour just sitting and taking photographs.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICE0r-Kaw&fid=0x0:0xdfb79e16d3b4103c"],"When":"2017-12-31"},{"Name":"david howells","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXv00dm90sqOsiG9tuO5orrJOqUEDS-SlSH6CFfk8dmCBLrELi0Jw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Nice area of Retiró park, very pretty with some lovely quirky trees and a cool monument.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIChsorPDA&fid=0x0:0xdfb79e16d3b4103c"],"When":"2023-2-9"},{"Name":"Geovanny","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWpba9fybFOGKARgiQWJJKLXixzY6BzcQ8Id_v0GFsgkaMSRfk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jacinto Benavente, a highly influential Spanish playwright born in Madrid in 1866 and who died there in 1954, significantly revitalized Spanish theater with his realistic comedies and social satires, earning him the Nobel Prize in Literature in 1922; his prolific output of plays, which explored the moral complexities of Spanish society, cemented his legacy as a key figure in 20th-century Spanish drama","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDIzOWHWA&fid=0x0:0xdfb79e16d3b4103c"],"When":"2025-4-7"},{"Name":"macedonboy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7obIFVFelZpGZFWErr47Wzzrz8xLtHVDOYNGdpIt459EbUg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This monument stands in tribute to Jacinto Benavente, considered to be the foremost Spanish writer of the 20th century and was awarded the Nobel Prize for Literature in 1922.

The monument features a bronze classical sculpture featuring a woman (presumably an actress), hold a theatre mask as if about to place it onto her face. The sculpture stands atop a plinth, which a rectangular stone block bearing the name of Jacinto Benavente and a bronze relief sculpture of the writer.

A beautiful classical statue and all the more so for it's easy to understand reference to a Nobel winning writer.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICc_L-c-gE&fid=0x0:0xdfb79e16d3b4103c"],"When":"2020-2-17"},{"Name":"A V","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJZBqTmmYT3Q0x4e4TLC7rAKSnv94GL00nBaa9xzXt_6PhbxQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very well maintained and gorgeous area surrounding statue to famous Spanish dramatist.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID44KroBg&fid=0x0:0xdfb79e16d3b4103c"],"When":"2017-11-10"},{"Name":"Miguel P.C.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVPDy8QrAcFWEOFTkH4s_QD0aosAntu-Z4gpRrjANDg-25LaA6qXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful garden, well kept and nice to walk around.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICO_oKtngE&fid=0x0:0xdfb79e16d3b4103c"],"When":"2022-6-11"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Leslie Joseph Pattison","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV6PJPTMLQYa4SAcrOtu4fEd49uhc8LubZbNJ8FqPUK8qviqqc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"CASTELLANO · Monumento a la Constitución de 1978 de Madrid

As you wander around Madrid, you will notice that there are loads of political memories shared with the proud Madridians.

This open cube white marble structure is pleasing to the eye. It is open on all sides, to show that it is for all Spaniards.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pranayamananda","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWeradio62hnkhh5qVD1uBFNEGb_SlYbnRuG7pJ_KyAl5myFsmX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"4th dimension","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICMzr2RrgE&fid=0x0:0xa6af6dd11bc4e556"],"When":"2019-10-23"},{"Name":"Vivo Vázquez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLvUyRyXlZBRb-TT4BhrnwZ8T78FNkcDjPnfNdsrNdFZg9teg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Este monumento es una magnífica obra que simboliza uno de los momentos más importantes de nuestra historia democrática. Su diseño cubista y moderno contrasta de manera interesante con el entorno clásico de los Nuevos Ministerios. La estructura imponente, realizada en hormigón, representa con fuerza los valores constitucionales que marcaron el inicio de nuestra democracia moderna. Su ubicación cerca del Museo de Ciencias Naturales lo hace fácilmente accesible. Es un lugar perfecto para reflexionar sobre nuestra historia reciente y los logros democráticos.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Miguel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWrTIbeSRTZp5Sa-saexhGZIAagis3FYMCk6ppqxr3YPAwdHIUT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Monumento que te sorprende al ir al Museo de Ciencias Naturales de Madrid que comparte edificio con la Facultad de Ingeniería Industrial.
No pasa desapercibido, ya que por su envergadura, su forma cuadrada y color blanco llama la atención.
Un bello monumento dedicado a la constitución española de 1978.
Se puede admirar desde cualquier punto de vista y admite diversas interpretaciones.
Un lugar tan céntrico que siempre me sorprende la suciedad que dejan abandonada los que lo ocupan para hacer botellón.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID7qsfTLg&fid=0x0:0xa6af6dd11bc4e556"],"When":"2024-8-23"},{"Name":"Observador silencioso","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUV5Kfr24BoKS-SWahVwZTWbNq24LwgMfFgRcZ6TzK7kVv-Y0Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Monumento que conmemora el quinto aniversario de la Constitución Española de 1978. Fue diseñado por Rafael de la Hoz Arderius y el escultor José Noja, y se inauguró en 1983 como homenaje a la llegada de la democracia. La obra consiste en una gran estructura de hormigón en forma de arco que simboliza la entrada a la libertad y la unidad del país. Diseño sobrio y minimalista para reflejar la solemnidad del momento histórico que representa y el entorno ajardinado que lo rodea invita a detenerse y reflexionar sobre el valor del consenso y los derechos ciudadanos. No es un monumento turístico, pero sí un punto de referencia que mantiene vivo el recuerdo de la Transición y de los principios democráticos que definieron una nueva etapa para España. En su base se conserva una placa conmemorativa con la inscripción dedicada a la Constitución y al pueblo español.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Álvaro Casado Manso","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVms99zee7W9cIl6kDFU1LUYLkY1IwNsis8wDGk5HcZRqdIwug=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Homenaje a nuestra Constitución.
Ubicado en un bonito parque, muy cuidado y junto al Paseo de la Castellana.
Punto habitual de encuentro.
Mucha gente se hace fotografías en el, muy fotografiable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDzi4nWnAE&fid=0x0:0xa6af6dd11bc4e556"],"When":"2024-6-12"},{"Name":"Leroux Yvan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU70AOFqaxllXLqaBRq04GwPtl1TtmkyQoJAN5rrOxRpzXBlwE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"J’adore ce super endroit, le Monument à la Constitution de 1978. C’est une œuvre sculpturale érigée à Madrid en hommage à la Constitution espagnole de 1978. Il est situé dans les jardins des Beaux-Arts.
Excellente visite par beau temps.

un "aime" pour mon Ais Google, merciet Enjoy! 🇪🇸","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID5nvmFnQE&fid=0x0:0xa6af6dd11bc4e556"],"When":"2023-10-24"},{"Name":"Doncelador","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXnewNEbYYaXdHD0epgVByIWzW2jKqBZMPTzU18-HYzM_sBuOGCqw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Data de 1982 inaugurado por el Presidente de las Cortes con el alcalde de Madrid y es obra de Miguel Ángel Ruiz Larrea, es una pieza cúbica de 5 X 5 X 5 metros, construida en hormigón armado recubierto con placas de mármol blanco de Macael. Hay cuatro rotulos con los mensajes, "A la Constitución de 1978" y "El pueblo de Madrid".","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICktZfCRQ&fid=0x0:0xa6af6dd11bc4e556"],"When":"2018-11-21"}]

title: Monument to Christopher Columbus
address: Pl. de Colón, Centro, 28001 Madrid
open_hours: {"Friday":["Open 24 hours"],"Monday":["Open 24 hours"],"Saturday":["Open 24 hours"],"Sunday":["Open 24 hours"],"Thursday":["Open 24 hours"],"Tuesday":["Open 24 hours"],"Wednesday":["Open 24 hours"]}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Mark M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUS9xWFdqeoIGM48SlGzqRbIUYckO5GoiKaVUECu7qOA5BWOej9UQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Monumento a Cristóbal Colón stands as a majestic sentinel in the heart of Madrid, anchoring the vibrant Plaza de Colón with its neogothic elegance. Designed by Arturo Mélida and sculpted by Jerónimo Suñol, this 17-meter-tall landmark is a masterpiece of late 19th-century artistry. The intricate white marble statue of Columbus, draped in a cloak and holding the flag of Castile, gazes eastward, evoking a sense of timeless adventure and maritime legacy.
What makes a visit truly special is the seamless blend of history and modern urban beauty. The monument is situated within the Jardines del Descubrimiento, where the roar of the massive cascading fountain provides a soothing soundtrack to the city’s bustle. Standing at its base, you can appreciate the intricate carvings on the pedestal that detail the famous voyages.
The surrounding area is a cultural treasure trove; the square also hosts the world’s largest Spanish flag and the fascinating "Julia" sculpture by Jaume Plensa. Whether you are a history enthusiast or simply looking for a picturesque spot to relax between visits to the nearby National Archaeological Museum and the upscale shops of Serrano, the Columbus Monument is an essential, uplifting stop on any Madrid itinerary.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCp8sd7f9KzUU38ZsT7oiCW&fid=0x0:0x33d1b8829355e4a"],"When":"2025-12-23"},{"Name":"snarkyguy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUpLEkMbqQ117vEXR5NomvRhhZgkwVvVtKfHyjAnrI4JKwbnhs2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Super detailed monument in a cool part of town. It sits opposite the Bronze statue of a Fat Lady by Fernando Botero and is really cool to view at sundown. Every angle of this square looks good and is well-displayed. The monument itself is on a tall dais with outstretched arms near Centro Colon.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICdjtqvMg&fid=0x0:0x33d1b8829355e4a"],"When":"2024-2-15"},{"Name":"macedonboy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7obIFVFelZpGZFWErr47Wzzrz8xLtHVDOYNGdpIt459EbUg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"This monument stands in tribute to Christopher Columbus, the explorer who discovered the Americas for Spain. The monument consists of a statue of columbus atop a 17m high plinth which is built in the Gothic style. It's located in the centre of a roundabout in a very busy road and because it's so high up and so far from the pedestrian pavement, it's pretty difficult to get a good view of it.

One good thing about it's location is that the Torre Colon provides an interesting backdrop if taking photos from Plaza Colon. It's good to see the statue for it's historical value, but thumbs down for the difficulty in getting good views of the monument.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICE1IaT5AE&fid=0x0:0x33d1b8829355e4a"],"When":"2019-4-22"},{"Name":"George Messinia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLCxA8R_mO15QqKHTo8jPP0_YjV-KgANNdlMxoMmbA5sKi-qQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Columbus Square was originally called 'Plaza de Santiago', but was renamed in 1893 in honor of the famous explorer who discovered America. The square is dominated by the statue of Columbus, Monumento a Cristóbal Colón, standing on a tall column, looking in the direction of the new world. The square is also home to the Jardines del Descubrimiento, a park first opened in 1970 where you can admire various sculptures as well as a monument dedicated to the discovery of America. Just in front of Columbus Square is the National Archaeological Museum of Spain and the National Library.
On the north side of the square are the twin skyscrapers Torres de Colón which are two 117m high office skyscrapers with 23 floors. They were built between 1967 and 1976 by architect Antonio Lamela. Today the towers are being renovated.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJudW1Ng&fid=0x0:0x33d1b8829355e4a"],"When":"2023-6-30"},{"Name":"Seokjin Ham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIhtf6A7X2UDP--Xi1vhwXxfhLJk0GUh_pTYJvgqrBOTATbUg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It is a neo-Gothic monument built between 1881 and 1885. descriptions: Memorial obelisk honoring those slain during the May 2 rebellion against French troops in 1808.
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"macedonboy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7obIFVFelZpGZFWErr47Wzzrz8xLtHVDOYNGdpIt459EbUg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This Monument to the Fallen for Spain, colloquially known as the 'Obelisk' is the Madrid equivalent to the tomb of the unknown soldier. Originally intended to honour those who died in the Mayo uprising during the French occupation, it was re-dedicated to all fallen soldier of Spain, except for the aforementioned uprising.

Like many such monuments, this also has an eternal flame. A worthy tribute to all of Spain's fallen.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICE1IbjNw&fid=0x0:0xdcaa7153d2243b83"],"When":"2019-4-22"},{"Name":"david howells","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXv00dm90sqOsiG9tuO5orrJOqUEDS-SlSH6CFfk8dmCBLrELi0Jw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This memorial (Monumento a los Caídos por España), also known as the "Obelisco", commemorates the victims of the uprising on 2 May 1808 (Dos de Mayo) in Madrid against the French occupation. After the uprising, numerous Spaniards were executed here by the French.
It is also the national memorial for all Spaniards who have been killed in war. It is similar to the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier in the UK/US but I’m unsure if it contains such a tomb? English sources vary 🤷
It also has a permanent eternal gas flame. This might explain the lack of access by a high sided railing fence.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICh8rKCfg&fid=0x0:0xdcaa7153d2243b83"],"When":"2023-2-9"},{"Name":"Diego Caicedo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUeT5xPIRir96hdnD_9IOq5jnKEpMQWtEqH7_ZC1x6B6XABBI5G=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Incredible zone. It's a nice green moment in this beautiful city. It was created in 1640 by Pietro Tacca. The iconic equestrian statue is famous as the world’s first to depict a horse rearing solely on its hind legs, an extraordinary feat made possible by balance calculations reportedly advised by Galileo Galilei. With the Royal Palace of Madrid rising majestically in the background, the monument catches my attention and perfectly blends history, science, and royal grandeur in one unforgettable setting. I so enjoyed the walk thru of this fantastic place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCCy5towdqlzi3pT6cuY2_w&fid=0x0:0xda7a7c767d12f0c4"],"When":"2026-2-1"},{"Name":"Rae Zyon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUG1QtdDeQPQLETzpCBgyDyGAAEvIdbUpAe1YDVy3QwmQLrwpSA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The monument work is incredibly detailed, and the surrounding fountains and sculptures of lions add a regal touch to the entire plaza. The grandeur of the palace serves as a fitting contrast to the intricate details of the monument, offering a visual feast that captures the essence of Madrid's cultural richness and architectural splendor. The monument or fountain of Philip IV is a memorial to Philip IV of Spain in the center of Plaza de Oriente in Madrid, by artist Pietro Tacca, opened in 1640.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDD-qv6Zg&fid=0x0:0xda7a7c767d12f0c4"],"When":"2024-4-8"},{"Name":"Sujay Sreekumar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVumGJV6xX-6oOoutWU4H-QZK8DBm7Z4WoS8V_5PLgc6Dfl9alo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a very picturesque and nice area of Madrid, right opposite the palace. title: Monumento al Cabo Noval
address: Pl. de Ote., 9, Centro, 28013 Madrid
open_hours: {"Friday":["Open 24 hours"],"Monday":["Open 24 hours"],"Saturday":["Open 24 hours"],"Sunday":["Open 24 hours"],"Thursday":["Open 24 hours"],"Tuesday":["Open 24 hours"],"Wednesday":["Open 24 hours"]}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"macedonboy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7obIFVFelZpGZFWErr47Wzzrz8xLtHVDOYNGdpIt459EbUg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This monument stands in tribute to Corporal Luis Noval, a Spanish who served in the Spanish Colonial wars in Morocco. He was taken prisoner by the Rif forces, who forced him to take them to the entrance of the Spanish camp. The Spanish soldiers did not shoot when they saw Noval coming, but he shouted out a warning to his comrades that it was an ambush and died in the following firefight. After his death, he was awarded the second class cross of the Military Order of San Fernando.

This monument depicts Noval in uniform, marching with his rifle on his shoulder. Behind his is a Spanish women, holding up the Spanish flag to encourage Noval onwards. At the base of the monument you can see the Rif rebels scattering at the sight of Noval.

The monument stands in Plaza de Oriente, near the royal palace and worth a visit to get the bit of history. It's lovely to see a nice monument honouring and otherwise ordinary soldier instead of some rich aristocrat.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICcgsLI7gE&fid=0x0:0xa91041363b237a25"],"When":"2020-2-17"},{"Name":"Francisco Leung","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVrsCUuLOU9HZpwdyFGCYf97VlwByAtR-r9wMwJl9ZmusLoiqhB=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a nice monument that remembers Luis Noval Ferrao, who was a soldier in the Spanish army. It's located in the Gardens of Cabo Noval, which appears to be a smaller sub-section of Plaza de Oriente.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJ3OmvOQ&fid=0x0:0xa91041363b237a25"],"When":"2023-6-22"},{"Name":"BradinHK","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWh6zDfP2gQdpxFs5vZrrUNYezD0Dpnk56YFX0OBmXdNJCxRY4DFg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"One of the interesting things to see at Plaza De Oriente is the monument to Luis Noval Ferrao, a heroic Spanish soldier who fought and died during battle in Morocco in 1909.

Ferrao was noted for his bravery and heroic fighting, becoming a symbol of national pride and nationalism during the early part of the 20th century. A product of that movement was this bronze statue was created by Spanish sculptor Marino Benlliure in 1912.

Here you find a bronze figure, fully dressed in soldiery attire and gear, walking forward in front of a large scale stone flag being held by a female figure. The statue is atop a decorative stone pedestal, with inscription in Spanish.

It is a nice war memorial, located at the northern end of Plaza De Oriente in an area referred to locally, and in travel books, as Jardines Del Cabo Noval. It is worth having a quick look if you enjoy seeing monuments during your travels.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDE3LDGZQ&fid=0x0:0xa91041363b237a25"],"When":"2018-9-8"},{"Name":"Jonathan Canales","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX0mSyJjLzsV21q79054K1crJ8IayiaCW_8ZyC9epoh-RVDEDgvdg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tucked away statue with beautiful detail regarding a national hero.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Francisco Lucena","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXAnbPEgO38IAgd5mIrYHf4QXKfnMypv1751f6z9U8cL9E_HQHDQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Monumento homenaje al cabo Noval, muerto en la guerra de África en 1909 por avisar a sus compañeros de una emboscada enemiga, inaugurado en 1912 con la asistencia del rey Alfonso 13 el monumento es obra del escultor valenciano mariano benlliure,genio responsable de muchas obrad instaladas por todo Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDRtSGrZd1m2Qae-nit1Yjv&fid=0x0:0xa91041363b237a25"],"When":"2025-9-26"},{"Name":"Vivo Vázquez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLvUyRyXlZBRb-TT4BhrnwZ8T78FNkcDjPnfNdsrNdFZg9teg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El Monumento al Cabo Noval en la Plaza de Oriente es un tributo a un soldado heroico que salvó la vida del rey Alfonso XIII. La estatua en bronce muestra al Cabo Noval en una pose valiente y decidida. Se encuentra en un entorno privilegiado, muy cerca del Palacio Real, lo que permite admirar varios monumentos históricos en un mismo paseo. Es una obra que recuerda actos de valentía y lealtad. Un lugar de gran valor histórico en Madrid.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Davide Pizzi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWz7eu3ngE_5MLgmwkNyqP8hPmJcrBxnXxnIhpnQ2Sc3MTiZvpl8g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Il monumento in onore del caporale Noval , morto nella guerra in Africa nel 1909 per aver avvertito i suoi compagni dell'imminenza di un'imboscata nemica.
L'eroismo del soldato ha dato origine a questo tributo. Il monumento si trova nei Giardini di Cape Noval, che costituiscono la parte settentrionale di Plaza de Oriente. A metà strada tra il Palazzo Reale e il Monastero di La Encarnación, il posto è uno dei più silenziosi dell'ambiente.
Inaugurato nel 1912 con l'assistenza del re Alfonso XIII , il monumento è opera dello scultore valenciano Mariano Benlliure.
L'artista valenciano è responsabile di molte altre opere installate a Madrid, come il monumento a Don Álvaro de Bazán , la figura di Goya di fronte al Museo del Prado, alcune sculture sulla facciata del Metropolis Building o alcune delle incredibili opere funebri del Pantheon di uomini illustri.
Il gruppo rappresenta Luis Noval in marcia con il suo fucile in spalla. Una bandiera tenuta da una donna vola dietro di lui.
Il suo prezzo è stato pagato con un tributo popolare grazie all'impulso di un numerose di donne. La regina Vittoria Eugenia era una dei benefattori, i cui nomi sono incisi sul retro.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDsqsLl6QE&fid=0x0:0xa91041363b237a25"],"When":"2020-2-29"},{"Name":"Sylvia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVOWq9WYcCoOzNqXTQwC4axJG5Si91HKepVCCpOlBLrxjAg7NVFbA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"En la plaza de Oriente, en unos jardines que llevan su nombre está el monumento del Cabo Noval, heroico soldado que aviso a sus tropas de un emboscada en la guerra de África. Es obra del escultor valenciano Mariano Benlliure. Zona tranquila y muy bonita para pasear.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICyiYKZSA&fid=0x0:0xa91041363b237a25"],"When":"2021-2-3"}]
